toolUseResult.originalFile:
# CI/CD Pipeline for Blog (anshumanbiswas.com)
#
# Native multi-arch builds on self-hosted runners — no cross-compilation.
# Push to main builds ARM64 + x64 images in parallel, pushes both to Harbor,
# then auto-deploys staging (ARM64). Promoting to prod uses the already-built
# x64 image from Harbor (no rebuild needed).
#
# Runners:
#   ARM64 runner: Staging server (129.213.82.37) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, ARM64
#   x64 runner:   Prod server (31.97.102.48) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod
#   x64 runner:   UAT server (92.4.83.28) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, X64, uat
#
# Flow:
#   main push       → test → build ARM64 + x64 (parallel) → deploy staging (ARM64)
#   uat push        → deploy UAT using arm64-latest from Harbor
#   production push → deploy prod using x64-latest from Harbor
#
# Required secrets:
#   HARBOR_AUTH                   — base64("username:password") for Harbor registry
#   STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY       — raw PEM SSH key for staging server
#   UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY           — raw PEM SSH key for UAT server
#   SSH_PRIVATE_KEY               — raw PEM SSH key for production server
#   BLOG_PG_PASSWORD, BLOG_SESSION_SECRET, BLOG_API_TOKEN
#   ENCRYPTION_KEY (or per-env: STAGING_ENCRYPTION_KEY, UAT_ENCRYPTION_KEY, PRODUCTION_ENCRYPTION_KEY)
#   GH_CLIENT_ID, GH_CLIENT_SECRET, OAUTH_STATE_SECRET
#   SONAR_TOKEN, DD_API_KEY, DD_SITE

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, uat, production]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  # ── Go Tests ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  test:
    name: "Blog Tests (Go)"
    runs-on: ${{ vars.CI_RUNNER || 'self-hosted' }}
    if: |
      (vars.CI_ENABLED || 'true') == 'true' &&
      (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request')

    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:15-alpine
        env:
          POSTGRES_USER: blog
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: testpass
          POSTGRES_DB: blog
        ports:
          - 5434:5432
        options: >-
          --health-cmd pg_isready
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

    env:
      PG_HOST: 127.0.0.1
      PG_PORT: 5434
      PG_USER: blog
      PG_PASSWORD: testpass
      PG_DB: blog
      GOTOOLCHAIN: local

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.26'
          cache: true

      - name: Run database migrations
        run: |
          ARCH=$(uname -m)
          [ "$ARCH" = "aarch64" ] && MIGRATE_ARCH="arm64" || MIGRATE_ARCH="amd64"
          curl -sL "https://github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/releases/download/v4.17.0/migrate.linux-${MIGRATE_ARCH}.tar.gz" | tar xz
          chmod +x migrate
          ./migrate -source file://migrations \
            -database "postgresql://blog:testpass@127.0.0.1:5434/blog?sslmode=disable" up

      - run: go vet ./...

      - name: Run tests
        run: go test -v -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...
        timeout-minutes: 10

      - run: go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage
          path: coverage.out
          retention-days: 30

  # ── SonarQube (allowed to fail) ────────────────────────────────────────
  sonarqube:
    name: "SonarQube Analysis"
    runs-on: ${{ vars.CI_RUNNER || 'self-hosted' }}
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    continue-on-error: true

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run SonarQube
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          ARCH=$(uname -m)
          SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION=5.0.1.3006
          if [ "$ARCH" = "aarch64" ]; then
            SONAR_ZIP="sonar-scanner-cli-${SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION}-linux-aarch64.zip"
          else
            SONAR_ZIP="sonar-scanner-cli-${SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION}-linux.zip"
          fi
          curl -sSLo sonar-scanner.zip \
            "https://binaries.sonarsource.com/Distribution/sonar-scanner-cli/$SONAR_ZIP"
          unzip -q sonar-scanner.zip
          SCANNER_DIR=$(ls -d sonar-scanner-*)
          "$SCANNER_DIR/bin/sonar-scanner" \
            -Dsonar.host.url="https://sonar.taskai.cc" \
            -Dsonar.token="$SONAR_TOKEN" \
            -Dsonar.projectVersion="$(git describe --tags --always 2>/dev/null || echo dev)"

  # ── Build ARM64 Image (native on ARM64 runner) ─────────────────────────
  build-arm64:
    name: "Build ARM64 Image"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      tag: ${{ steps.build.outputs.tag }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="arm64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"
          IMAGE="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog"

          # Docker login to Harbor
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          # Native build (no cross-compilation)
          docker build --cache-from "$IMAGE:arm64-latest" -t "$IMAGE:$TAG" .
          docker push "$IMAGE:$TAG"

          # Tag as arm64-latest
          docker tag "$IMAGE:$TAG" "$IMAGE:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$IMAGE:arm64-latest"

          echo "tag=$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Built and pushed $IMAGE:$TAG (ARM64)"

  # ── Build x64 Image (native on x64 runner) ───────────────────────────
  build-x64:
    name: "Build x64 Image"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      tag: ${{ steps.build.outputs.tag }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="x64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"
          IMAGE="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog"

          # Docker login to Harbor
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          # Native build (no cross-compilation)
          docker build --cache-from "$IMAGE:x64-latest" -t "$IMAGE:$TAG" .
          docker push "$IMAGE:$TAG"

          # Tag as x64-latest
          docker tag "$IMAGE:$TAG" "$IMAGE:x64-latest"
          docker push "$IMAGE:x64-latest"

          echo "tag=$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Built and pushed $IMAGE:$TAG (x64)"

  # ── Deploy Staging (ARM64) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-staging:
    name: "Deploy to Staging"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: build-arm64
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: staging

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          BLOG_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.BLOG_PG_PASSWORD }}
          BLOG_SESSION_SECRET: ${{ secrets.BLOG_SESSION_SECRET }}
          BLOG_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOG_API_TOKEN }}
          STAGING_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${{ secrets.STAGING_ENCRYPTION_KEY || secrets.ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
          GH_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_ID }}
          GH_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_SECRET }}
          OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
          VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERSION_TOKEN }}
          IMAGE_TAG: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.tag }}
        run: |
          # Use the ARM64 image tag built in the previous job
          echo "harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog:${IMAGE_TAG}" > .image-tag.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh staging

  # ── Deploy UAT (ARM64, optional) ───────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-uat:
    name: "Deploy to UAT"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    if: |
      (vars.CI_ENABLED || 'true') == 'true' &&
      github.ref == 'refs/heads/uat' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: uat

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy using arm64-latest image from Harbor
        env:
          UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          BLOG_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.BLOG_PG_PASSWORD }}
          BLOG_SESSION_SECRET: ${{ secrets.BLOG_SESSION_SECRET }}
          BLOG_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOG_API_TOKEN }}
          UAT_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${{ secrets.UAT_ENCRYPTION_KEY || secrets.ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
          GH_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_ID }}
          GH_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_SECRET }}
          OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
          VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERSION_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          # Use arm64-latest from Harbor (already built on push to main)
          echo "harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog:arm64-latest" > .image-tag.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh uat

  # ── Deploy Production (x64) ────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-production:
    name: "Deploy to Production"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    if: |
      (vars.CI_ENABLED || 'true') == 'true' &&
      github.ref == 'refs/heads/production' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: production

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy using x64-latest image from Harbor
        env:
          PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          BLOG_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.BLOG_PG_PASSWORD }}
          BLOG_SESSION_SECRET: ${{ secrets.BLOG_SESSION_SECRET }}
          BLOG_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOG_API_TOKEN }}
          PRODUCTION_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_ENCRYPTION_KEY || secrets.ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
          GH_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_ID }}
          GH_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_SECRET }}
          OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
          VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERSION_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          # Use x64-latest from Harbor (already built on push to main)
          echo "harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog:x64-latest" > .image-tag.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh production

#   ARM64 runner: Staging server (129.213.82.37) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, ARM64
#   x64 runner:   Prod server (31.97.102.48) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod
#   x64 runner:   UAT server (92.4.83.28) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, X64, uat
#
# Flow:
#   main push       → test → build ARM64 + x64 (parallel) → deploy staging (ARM64)
#   uat push        → deploy UAT using arm64-latest from Harbor
#   production push → deploy prod using x64-latest from Harbor
#
# Required secrets:
#   HARBOR_AUTH                   — base64("username:password") for Harbor registry
#   STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY       — raw PEM SSH key for staging server
#   UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY           — raw PEM SSH key for UAT server
#   SSH_PRIVATE_KEY               — raw PEM SSH key for production server
#   BLOG_PG_PASSWORD, BLOG_SESSION_SECRET, BLOG_API_TOKEN
#   ENCRYPTION_KEY (or per-env: STAGING_ENCRYPTION_KEY, UAT_ENCRYPTION_KEY, PRODUCTION_ENCRYPTION_KEY)
#   GH_CLIENT_ID, GH_CLIENT_SECRET, OAUTH_STATE_SECRET
#   SONAR_TOKEN, DD_API_KEY, DD_SITE

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, uat, production]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  # ── Go Tests ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  test:
    name: "Blog Tests (Go)"
    runs-on: ${{ vars.CI_RUNNER || 'self-hosted' }}
    if: |
      (vars.CI_ENABLED || 'true') == 'true' &&
      (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request')

    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:15-alpine
        env:
          POSTGRES_USER: blog
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: testpass
          POSTGRES_DB: blog
        ports:
          - 5434:5432
        options: >-
          --health-cmd pg_isready
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

    env:
      PG_HOST: 127.0.0.1
      PG_PORT: 5434
      PG_USER: blog
      PG_PASSWORD: testpass
      PG_DB: blog
      GOTOOLCHAIN: local

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.26'
          cache: true

      - name: Run database migrations
        run: |
          ARCH=$(uname -m)
          [ "$ARCH" = "aarch64" ] && MIGRATE_ARCH="arm64" || MIGRATE_ARCH="amd64"
          curl -sL "https://github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/releases/download/v4.17.0/migrate.linux-${MIGRATE_ARCH}.tar.gz" | tar xz
          chmod +x migrate
          ./migrate -source file://migrations \
            -database "postgresql://blog:testpass@127.0.0.1:5434/blog?sslmode=disable" up

      - run: go vet ./...

      - name: Run tests
        run: go test -v -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...
        timeout-minutes: 10

      - run: go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage
          path: coverage.out
          retention-days: 30

  # ── SonarQube (allowed to fail) ────────────────────────────────────────
  sonarqube:
    name: "SonarQube Analysis"
    runs-on: ${{ vars.CI_RUNNER || 'self-hosted' }}
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    continue-on-error: true

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run SonarQube
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          ARCH=$(uname -m)
          SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION=5.0.1.3006
          if [ "$ARCH" = "aarch64" ]; then
            SONAR_ZIP="sonar-scanner-cli-${SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION}-linux-aarch64.zip"
          else
            SONAR_ZIP="sonar-scanner-cli-${SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION}-linux.zip"
          fi
          curl -sSLo sonar-scanner.zip \
            "https://binaries.sonarsource.com/Distribution/sonar-scanner-cli/$SONAR_ZIP"
          unzip -q sonar-scanner.zip
          SCANNER_DIR=$(ls -d sonar-scanner-*)
          "$SCANNER_DIR/bin/sonar-scanner" \
            -Dsonar.host.url="https://sonar.taskai.cc" \
            -Dsonar.token="$SONAR_TOKEN" \
            -Dsonar.projectVersion="$(git describe --tags --always 2>/dev/null || echo dev)"

  # ── Build ARM64 Image (native on ARM64 runner) ─────────────────────────
  build-arm64:
    name: "Build ARM64 Image"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="arm64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"
          IMAGE="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog"

          # Docker login to Harbor
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          # Native build (no cross-compilation)
          docker build --cache-from "$IMAGE:arm64-latest" -t "$IMAGE:$TAG" .
          docker push "$IMAGE:$TAG"

          # Capture digest
          DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$IMAGE:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          echo "digest=$DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          # Tag as arm64-latest
          docker tag "$IMAGE:$TAG" "$IMAGE:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$IMAGE:arm64-latest"

          echo "Built and pushed $IMAGE:$TAG (ARM64) digest=$DIGEST"

  # ── Build x64 Image (native on x64 runner) ───────────────────────────
  build-x64:
    name: "Build x64 Image"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="x64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"
          IMAGE="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog"

          # Docker login to Harbor
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          # Native build (no cross-compilation)
          docker build --cache-from "$IMAGE:x64-latest" -t "$IMAGE:$TAG" .
          docker push "$IMAGE:$TAG"

          # Capture digest
          DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$IMAGE:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          echo "digest=$DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          # Tag as x64-latest
          docker tag "$IMAGE:$TAG" "$IMAGE:x64-latest"
          docker push "$IMAGE:x64-latest"

          echo "Built and pushed $IMAGE:$TAG (x64) digest=$DIGEST"

  # ── Deploy Staging (ARM64) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-staging:
    name: "Deploy to Staging"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: build-arm64
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: staging

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          BLOG_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.BLOG_PG_PASSWORD }}
          BLOG_SESSION_SECRET: ${{ secrets.BLOG_SESSION_SECRET }}
          BLOG_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOG_API_TOKEN }}
          STAGING_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${{ secrets.STAGING_ENCRYPTION_KEY || secrets.ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
          GH_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_ID }}
          GH_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_SECRET }}
          OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
          VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERSION_TOKEN }}
          IMAGE_TAG: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.tag }}
        run: |
          # Use the ARM64 image tag built in the previous job
          echo "harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog:${IMAGE_TAG}" > .image-tag.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh staging

  # ── Deploy UAT (ARM64, optional) ───────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-uat:
    name: "Deploy to UAT"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    if: |
      (vars.CI_ENABLED || 'true') == 'true' &&
      github.ref == 'refs/heads/uat' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: uat

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy using arm64-latest image from Harbor
        env:
          UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          BLOG_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.BLOG_PG_PASSWORD }}
          BLOG_SESSION_SECRET: ${{ secrets.BLOG_SESSION_SECRET }}
          BLOG_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOG_API_TOKEN }}
          UAT_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${{ secrets.UAT_ENCRYPTION_KEY || secrets.ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
          GH_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_ID }}
          GH_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_SECRET }}
          OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
          VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERSION_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          # Use arm64-latest from Harbor (already built on push to main)
          echo "harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog:arm64-latest" > .image-tag.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh uat

  # ── Deploy Production (x64) ────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-production:
    name: "Deploy to Production"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    if: |
      (vars.CI_ENABLED || 'true') == 'true' &&
      github.ref == 'refs/heads/production' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: production

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy using x64-latest image from Harbor
        env:
          PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          BLOG_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.BLOG_PG_PASSWORD }}
          BLOG_SESSION_SECRET: ${{ secrets.BLOG_SESSION_SECRET }}
          BLOG_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOG_API_TOKEN }}
          PRODUCTION_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_ENCRYPTION_KEY || secrets.ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
          GH_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_ID }}
          GH_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_SECRET }}
          OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
          VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERSION_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          # Use x64-latest from Harbor (already built on push to main)
          echo "harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog:x64-latest" > .image-tag.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh production

# CI/CD Pipeline for Blog (anshumanbiswas.com)
#
# Native multi-arch builds on self-hosted runners — no cross-compilation.
# Push to main builds ARM64 + x64 images in parallel, pushes both to Harbor,
# then auto-deploys staging (ARM64). Promoting to prod uses the already-built
# x64 image from Harbor (no rebuild needed).
#
# Runners:
#   ARM64 runner: Staging server (129.213.82.37) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, ARM64
#   x64 runner:   Prod server (31.97.102.48) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod
#   x64 runner:   UAT server (92.4.83.28) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, X64, uat
#
# Flow:

#   uat push        → deploy UAT using arm64-latest from Harbor
#   production push → deploy prod using x64-latest from Harbor
#

#   HARBOR_AUTH                   — base64("username:password") for Harbor registry

#   UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY           — raw PEM SSH key for UAT server
#   SSH_PRIVATE_KEY               — raw PEM SSH key for production server

  # ── Build x64 Image (native on x64 runner) ───────────────────────────
  build-x64:

          # Capture digest

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# CI/CD Pipeline for Blog (anshumanbiswas.com)
#
# Native multi-arch builds on self-hosted runners — no cross-compilation.
# Push to main builds ARM64 + x64 images in parallel, pushes both to Harbor,
# then auto-deploys staging (ARM64). Promoting to prod uses the already-built
# x64 image from Harbor (no rebuild needed).
#
# Runners:
#   ARM64 runner: Staging server (129.213.82.37) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, ARM64
#   x64 runner:   Prod server (31.97.102.48) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod
#   x64 runner:   UAT server (92.4.83.28) — labels: self-hosted, Linux, X64, uat
#
# Flow:
#   main push       → test → build ARM64 + x64 (parallel) → deploy staging (ARM64)
#   uat push        → deploy UAT using arm64-latest from Harbor
#   production push → deploy prod using x64-latest from Harbor
#
# Required secrets:
#   HARBOR_AUTH                   — base64("username:password") for Harbor registry
#   STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY       — raw PEM SSH key for staging server
#   UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY           — raw PEM SSH key for UAT server
#   SSH_PRIVATE_KEY               — raw PEM SSH key for production server
#   BLOG_PG_PASSWORD, BLOG_SESSION_SECRET, BLOG_API_TOKEN
#   ENCRYPTION_KEY (or per-env: STAGING_ENCRYPTION_KEY, UAT_ENCRYPTION_KEY, PRODUCTION_ENCRYPTION_KEY)
#   GH_CLIENT_ID, GH_CLIENT_SECRET, OAUTH_STATE_SECRET
#   SONAR_TOKEN, DD_API_KEY, DD_SITE

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, uat, production]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  # ── Go Tests ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  test:
    name: "Blog Tests (Go)"
    runs-on: ${{ vars.CI_RUNNER || 'self-hosted' }}
    if: |
      (vars.CI_ENABLED || 'true') == 'true' &&
      (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request')

    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:15-alpine
        env:
          POSTGRES_USER: blog
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: testpass
          POSTGRES_DB: blog
        ports:
          - 5434:5432
        options: >-
          --health-cmd pg_isready
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

    env:
      PG_HOST: 127.0.0.1
      PG_PORT: 5434
      PG_USER: blog
      PG_PASSWORD: testpass
      PG_DB: blog
      GOTOOLCHAIN: local

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.26'
          cache: true

      - name: Run database migrations
        run: |
          ARCH=$(uname -m)
          [ "$ARCH" = "aarch64" ] && MIGRATE_ARCH="arm64" || MIGRATE_ARCH="amd64"
          curl -sL "https://github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/releases/download/v4.17.0/migrate.linux-${MIGRATE_ARCH}.tar.gz" | tar xz
          chmod +x migrate
          ./migrate -source file://migrations \
            -database "postgresql://blog:testpass@127.0.0.1:5434/blog?sslmode=disable" up

      - run: go vet ./...

      - name: Run tests
        run: go test -v -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...
        timeout-minutes: 10

      - run: go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage
          path: coverage.out
          retention-days: 30

  # ── SonarQube (allowed to fail) ────────────────────────────────────────
  sonarqube:
    name: "SonarQube Analysis"
    runs-on: ${{ vars.CI_RUNNER || 'self-hosted' }}
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    continue-on-error: true

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run SonarQube
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          ARCH=$(uname -m)
          SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION=5.0.1.3006
          if [ "$ARCH" = "aarch64" ]; then
            SONAR_ZIP="sonar-scanner-cli-${SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION}-linux-aarch64.zip"
          else
            SONAR_ZIP="sonar-scanner-cli-${SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION}-linux.zip"
          fi
          curl -sSLo sonar-scanner.zip \
            "https://binaries.sonarsource.com/Distribution/sonar-scanner-cli/$SONAR_ZIP"
          unzip -q sonar-scanner.zip
          SCANNER_DIR=$(ls -d sonar-scanner-*)
          "$SCANNER_DIR/bin/sonar-scanner" \
            -Dsonar.host.url="https://sonar.taskai.cc" \
            -Dsonar.token="$SONAR_TOKEN" \
            -Dsonar.projectVersion="$(git describe --tags --always 2>/dev/null || echo dev)"

  # ── Build ARM64 Image (native on ARM64 runner) ─────────────────────────
  build-arm64:
    name: "Build ARM64 Image"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="arm64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"
          IMAGE="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog"

          # Docker login to Harbor
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          # Native build (no cross-compilation)
          docker build --cache-from "$IMAGE:arm64-latest" -t "$IMAGE:$TAG" .
          docker push "$IMAGE:$TAG"

          # Capture digest
          DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$IMAGE:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          echo "digest=$DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          # Tag as arm64-latest
          docker tag "$IMAGE:$TAG" "$IMAGE:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$IMAGE:arm64-latest"

          echo "Built and pushed $IMAGE:$TAG (ARM64) digest=$DIGEST"

  # ── Build x64 Image (native on x64 runner) ───────────────────────────
  build-x64:
    name: "Build x64 Image"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="x64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"
          IMAGE="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog"

          # Docker login to Harbor
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          # Native build (no cross-compilation)
          docker build --cache-from "$IMAGE:x64-latest" -t "$IMAGE:$TAG" .
          docker push "$IMAGE:$TAG"

          # Capture digest
          DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$IMAGE:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          echo "digest=$DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          # Tag as x64-latest
          docker tag "$IMAGE:$TAG" "$IMAGE:x64-latest"
          docker push "$IMAGE:x64-latest"

          echo "Built and pushed $IMAGE:$TAG (x64) digest=$DIGEST"

  # ── Deploy Staging (ARM64) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-staging:
    name: "Deploy to Staging"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: build-arm64
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: staging

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          BLOG_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.BLOG_PG_PASSWORD }}
          BLOG_SESSION_SECRET: ${{ secrets.BLOG_SESSION_SECRET }}
          BLOG_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOG_API_TOKEN }}
          STAGING_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${{ secrets.STAGING_ENCRYPTION_KEY || secrets.ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
          GH_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_ID }}
          GH_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_SECRET }}
          OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
          VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERSION_TOKEN }}
          IMAGE_DIGEST: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.digest }}
        run: |
          echo "$IMAGE_DIGEST" > .image-digest.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh staging

  # ── Deploy UAT (ARM64, optional) ───────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-uat:
    name: "Deploy to UAT"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    if: |
      (vars.CI_ENABLED || 'true') == 'true' &&
      github.ref == 'refs/heads/uat' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: uat

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy using arm64-latest image from Harbor
        env:
          UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          BLOG_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.BLOG_PG_PASSWORD }}
          BLOG_SESSION_SECRET: ${{ secrets.BLOG_SESSION_SECRET }}
          BLOG_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOG_API_TOKEN }}
          UAT_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${{ secrets.UAT_ENCRYPTION_KEY || secrets.ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
          GH_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_ID }}
          GH_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_SECRET }}
          OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
          VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERSION_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          # No digest file — deploy script falls back to Harbor API lookup
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh uat

  # ── Deploy Production (x64) ────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-production:
    name: "Deploy to Production"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    if: |
      (vars.CI_ENABLED || 'true') == 'true' &&
      github.ref == 'refs/heads/production' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: production

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy using x64-latest image from Harbor
        env:
          PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          BLOG_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.BLOG_PG_PASSWORD }}
          BLOG_SESSION_SECRET: ${{ secrets.BLOG_SESSION_SECRET }}
          BLOG_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOG_API_TOKEN }}
          PRODUCTION_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_ENCRYPTION_KEY || secrets.ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
          GH_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_ID }}
          GH_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_CLIENT_SECRET }}
          OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
          VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERSION_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          # Use x64-latest from Harbor (already built on push to main)
          echo "harbor.biswas.me/biswas/blog:x64-latest" > .image-tag.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh production

file.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Fast deployment: build Docker images directly on target servers
#
# Instead of building 8 images on Travis (4 services × 2 arches) and pushing
# to Harbor, this script SSHs into the target server and builds natively.
#
# Speed: ~3-4 min (vs ~12 min for cross-compile + Harbor push/pull)
# Trade-off: Build happens on server (uses server CPU briefly)
#
# Usage: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy-fast.sh <staging|uat|production>

set -euo pipefail

ENV="${1:?Usage: travis-deploy-fast.sh <staging|uat|production>}"

case "$ENV" in
  staging)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="129.213.82.37"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/taskai-staging"
    COMPOSE_PROJECT="taskai-staging"
    DOMAIN="staging.taskai.cc"
    MCP_DOMAIN="mcp.staging.taskai.cc"
    APP_URL="https://staging.taskai.cc"
    DB_DSN_VAR="STAGING_DB_DSN"
    JWT_SECRET_VAR="STAGING_JWT_SECRET"
    LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR="STAGING_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID"
    LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR="STAGING_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET"
    OAUTH_STATE_VAR="STAGING_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET"
    GOOGLE_ID_VAR="STAGING_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID"
    GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR="STAGING_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET"
    DD_PROFILING="true"
    EXTRA_PORTS=""
    ;;
  uat)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="92.4.83.28"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/taskai-uat"
    COMPOSE_PROJECT=""
    DOMAIN="uat.taskai.cc"
    MCP_DOMAIN=""
    APP_URL="https://uat.taskai.cc"
    DB_DSN_VAR="UAT_DB_DSN"
    JWT_SECRET_VAR="UAT_JWT_SECRET"
    LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR="UAT_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID"
    LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR="UAT_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET"
    OAUTH_STATE_VAR="UAT_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET"
    GOOGLE_ID_VAR="UAT_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID"
    GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR="UAT_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET"
    DD_PROFILING="false"
    EXTRA_PORTS="TASKAI_API_PORT=38888 TASKAI_WEB_PORT=33333"
    ;;
  production)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="31.97.102.48"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/taskai"
    COMPOSE_PROJECT="taskai"
    DOMAIN="taskai.cc"
    MCP_DOMAIN="mcp.taskai.cc"
    APP_URL="https://taskai.cc"
    DB_DSN_VAR="PRODUCTION_DB_DSN"
    JWT_SECRET_VAR="PRODUCTION_JWT_SECRET"
    LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR="PRODUCTION_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID"
    LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR="PRODUCTION_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET"
    OAUTH_STATE_VAR="PRODUCTION_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET"
    GOOGLE_ID_VAR="PRODUCTION_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID"
    GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR="PRODUCTION_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET"
    DD_PROFILING="true"
    EXTRA_PORTS=""
    ;;
  *)
    echo "ERROR: Unknown environment: $ENV"
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

# Resolve indirect variable references
DB_DSN="${!DB_DSN_VAR:-}"
JWT_SECRET="${!JWT_SECRET_VAR:-}"
LOGIN_GH_ID="${!LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR:-}"
LOGIN_GH_SECRET="${!LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR:-}"
OAUTH_STATE="${!OAUTH_STATE_VAR:-}"
GOOGLE_ID="${!GOOGLE_ID_VAR:-}"
GOOGLE_SECRET="${!GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR:-}"

VERSION=$(cat VERSION 2>/dev/null || echo "dev")
GIT_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
GIT_SHORT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
BUILD_TIME=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")

echo "=== TaskAI Fast Deploy ==="
echo "Environment: $ENV"
echo "Server:      $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
echo "Version:     $VERSION ($GIT_SHORT)"
echo "Strategy:    Build on server (native arch, no registry)"
echo ""

# SSH setup
SSH_KEY_VALUE="${!SSH_KEY_VAR:-}"
if [ -z "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: $SSH_KEY_VAR is not set"
  exit 1
fi

mkdir -p ~/.ssh
echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | base64 --decode > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
ssh-keyscan "$SERVER_IP" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null

SSH_CMD="ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
SCP_CMD="scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key"

# Determine compose command based on environment
if [ "$ENV" = "uat" ]; then
  COMPOSE_CMD="docker compose"
  SOURCE_DIR="$DEPLOY_DIR"
else
  COMPOSE_CMD="docker compose -f source/docker-compose.yml -p $COMPOSE_PROJECT"
  SOURCE_DIR="$DEPLOY_DIR/source"
fi

# --- Step 1: Sync source code to server ---
echo "=== Syncing source to server ==="

# Create target directory
$SSH_CMD "mkdir -p $SOURCE_DIR"

# Use git archive to create a clean tarball (no .git, respects .gitignore)
git archive --format=tar HEAD | gzip > /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz
$SCP_CMD /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz "$SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:/tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz"
rm -f /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz

# Extract on server
$SSH_CMD "cd $SOURCE_DIR && tar xzf /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz && rm -f /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz"
echo "Source synced"

# --- Step 2: Copy deployment scripts and run nginx setup ---
echo "=== Setting up nginx routes ==="
$SSH_CMD "chmod +x $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-draw-route.sh 2>/dev/null; sudo $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-draw-route.sh $DOMAIN 2>/dev/null || true"
$SSH_CMD "chmod +x $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-zero-downtime.sh 2>/dev/null; sudo $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-zero-downtime.sh $DOMAIN 2>/dev/null || true"

if [ -n "$MCP_DOMAIN" ]; then
  $SSH_CMD "chmod +x $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-mcp-agent-header.sh 2>/dev/null; sudo $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-mcp-agent-header.sh $MCP_DOMAIN 2>/dev/null || true"
fi

# --- Step 3: Build and deploy on server ---
echo "=== Building images on server (native arch) ==="

$SSH_CMD "bash -s" <<REMOTE_EOF
  set -e

  cd $DEPLOY_DIR

  export VERSION='$VERSION'
  export GIT_COMMIT='$GIT_SHORT'
  export BUILD_TIME='$BUILD_TIME'
  export DB_DRIVER='postgres'
  export DB_DSN='$DB_DSN'
  export JWT_SECRET='$JWT_SECRET'
  export APP_URL='$APP_URL'
  export OAUTH_SUCCESS_URL='${APP_URL}/oauth/callback'
  export OAUTH_ERROR_URL='${APP_URL}/login'
  export ENV='$ENV'

  # OAuth/Login secrets
  if [ -n '$LOGIN_GH_ID' ] && [ '$LOGIN_GH_ID' != '-' ]; then
    export LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID='$LOGIN_GH_ID'
    export LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET='$LOGIN_GH_SECRET'
  fi
  if [ -n '$OAUTH_STATE' ]; then
    export OAUTH_STATE_SECRET='$OAUTH_STATE'
  fi
  if [ -n '$GOOGLE_ID' ]; then
    export GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID='$GOOGLE_ID'
    export GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET='$GOOGLE_SECRET'
  fi

  # Datadog
  if [ -n '${DD_API_KEY:-}' ]; then
    export DD_API_KEY='${DD_API_KEY:-}'
    export DD_SITE='${DD_SITE:-datadoghq.com}'
    export APM_ENABLED='true'
    export DD_PROFILING_ENABLED='$DD_PROFILING'
  fi

  # UAT custom ports
  $( [ -n "$EXTRA_PORTS" ] && echo "export $EXTRA_PORTS" || echo "true" )

  # Disk space management
  DISK_USAGE=\$(df / | tail -1 | awk '{print \$5}' | tr -d '%')
  if [ "\$DISK_USAGE" -gt 80 ]; then
    echo "Disk usage \${DISK_USAGE}% — pruning..."
    docker builder prune -f --filter "until=48h" || true
    docker image prune -f || true
  fi

  # Build images natively on this server (no cross-compilation, no registry)
  echo "Building Docker images..."
  $COMPOSE_CMD build --parallel --build-arg VERSION='$VERSION' --build-arg GIT_COMMIT='$GIT_SHORT' --build-arg BUILD_TIME='$BUILD_TIME'

  # Deploy with force-recreate
  echo "Deploying..."
  $COMPOSE_CMD up -d --force-recreate --remove-orphans

  # Prune old images
  docker image prune -f || true

  sleep 10
  $COMPOSE_CMD ps
REMOTE_EOF

# --- Step 4: Verify deployment ---
echo ""
echo "=== Verifying deployment ==="
sleep 5

echo "Health check: https://$DOMAIN/api/health"
if curl -sf "https://$DOMAIN/api/health" 2>/dev/null; then
  echo ""
  echo "Health check passed"
else
  echo "WARNING: Health check failed (may be behind Cloudflare Access or still starting)"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== Fast deploy to $ENV complete ==="

rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key

content.text:
The deploy script expects base64-encoded SSH keys (`STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64`) but GitHub has raw PEM keys (`STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY`). I need to update the deploy script to handle both formats, and also check what secrets are missing.

Let me fix the SSH key handling and update the workflows to use correct secret names:

if echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | head -1 | grep -q "BEGIN"; then
  # Raw PEM key (GitHub Actions)
  echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
else
  # Base64-encoded key (Travis CI)
  echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | base64 --decode > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
fi

# Fast deployment: build Docker images directly on target servers
#
# Instead of building 8 images on Travis (4 services × 2 arches) and pushing
# to Harbor, this script SSHs into the target server and builds natively.
#
# Speed: ~3-4 min (vs ~12 min for cross-compile + Harbor push/pull)
# Trade-off: Build happens on server (uses server CPU briefly)
#
# Usage: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy-fast.sh <staging|uat|production>

set -euo pipefail

ENV="${1:?Usage: travis-deploy-fast.sh <staging|uat|production>}"

case "$ENV" in
  staging)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="129.213.82.37"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/taskai-staging"
    COMPOSE_PROJECT="taskai-staging"
    DOMAIN="staging.taskai.cc"
    MCP_DOMAIN="mcp.staging.taskai.cc"
    APP_URL="https://staging.taskai.cc"
    DB_DSN_VAR="STAGING_DB_DSN"
    JWT_SECRET_VAR="STAGING_JWT_SECRET"
    LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR="STAGING_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID"
    LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR="STAGING_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET"
    OAUTH_STATE_VAR="STAGING_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET"
    GOOGLE_ID_VAR="STAGING_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID"
    GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR="STAGING_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET"
    DD_PROFILING="true"
    EXTRA_PORTS=""
    ;;
  uat)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="92.4.83.28"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/taskai-uat"
    COMPOSE_PROJECT=""
    DOMAIN="uat.taskai.cc"
    MCP_DOMAIN=""
    APP_URL="https://uat.taskai.cc"
    DB_DSN_VAR="UAT_DB_DSN"
    JWT_SECRET_VAR="UAT_JWT_SECRET"
    LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR="UAT_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID"
    LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR="UAT_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET"
    OAUTH_STATE_VAR="UAT_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET"
    GOOGLE_ID_VAR="UAT_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID"
    GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR="UAT_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET"
    DD_PROFILING="false"
    EXTRA_PORTS="TASKAI_API_PORT=38888 TASKAI_WEB_PORT=33333"
    ;;
  production)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="31.97.102.48"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/taskai"
    COMPOSE_PROJECT="taskai"
    DOMAIN="taskai.cc"
    MCP_DOMAIN="mcp.taskai.cc"
    APP_URL="https://taskai.cc"
    DB_DSN_VAR="PRODUCTION_DB_DSN"
    JWT_SECRET_VAR="PRODUCTION_JWT_SECRET"
    LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR="PRODUCTION_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID"
    LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR="PRODUCTION_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET"
    OAUTH_STATE_VAR="PRODUCTION_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET"
    GOOGLE_ID_VAR="PRODUCTION_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID"
    GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR="PRODUCTION_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET"
    DD_PROFILING="true"
    EXTRA_PORTS=""
    ;;
  *)
    echo "ERROR: Unknown environment: $ENV"
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

# Resolve indirect variable references
DB_DSN="${!DB_DSN_VAR:-}"
JWT_SECRET="${!JWT_SECRET_VAR:-}"
LOGIN_GH_ID="${!LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR:-}"
LOGIN_GH_SECRET="${!LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR:-}"
OAUTH_STATE="${!OAUTH_STATE_VAR:-}"
GOOGLE_ID="${!GOOGLE_ID_VAR:-}"
GOOGLE_SECRET="${!GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR:-}"

VERSION=$(cat VERSION 2>/dev/null || echo "dev")
GIT_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
GIT_SHORT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
BUILD_TIME=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")

echo "=== TaskAI Fast Deploy ==="
echo "Environment: $ENV"
echo "Server:      $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
echo "Version:     $VERSION ($GIT_SHORT)"
echo "Strategy:    Build on server (native arch, no registry)"
echo ""

# SSH setup
SSH_KEY_VALUE="${!SSH_KEY_VAR:-}"
if [ -z "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: $SSH_KEY_VAR is not set"
  exit 1
fi

mkdir -p ~/.ssh
echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | base64 --decode > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
ssh-keyscan "$SERVER_IP" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null

SSH_CMD="ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
SCP_CMD="scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key"

# Determine compose command based on environment
if [ "$ENV" = "uat" ]; then
  COMPOSE_CMD="docker compose"
  SOURCE_DIR="$DEPLOY_DIR"
else
  COMPOSE_CMD="docker compose -f source/docker-compose.yml -p $COMPOSE_PROJECT"
  SOURCE_DIR="$DEPLOY_DIR/source"
fi

# --- Step 1: Sync source code to server ---
echo "=== Syncing source to server ==="

# Create target directory
$SSH_CMD "mkdir -p $SOURCE_DIR"

# Use git archive to create a clean tarball (no .git, respects .gitignore)
git archive --format=tar HEAD | gzip > /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz
$SCP_CMD /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz "$SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:/tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz"
rm -f /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz

# Extract on server
$SSH_CMD "cd $SOURCE_DIR && tar xzf /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz && rm -f /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz"
echo "Source synced"

# --- Step 2: Copy deployment scripts and run nginx setup ---
echo "=== Setting up nginx routes ==="
$SSH_CMD "chmod +x $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-draw-route.sh 2>/dev/null; sudo $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-draw-route.sh $DOMAIN 2>/dev/null || true"
$SSH_CMD "chmod +x $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-zero-downtime.sh 2>/dev/null; sudo $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-zero-downtime.sh $DOMAIN 2>/dev/null || true"

if [ -n "$MCP_DOMAIN" ]; then
  $SSH_CMD "chmod +x $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-mcp-agent-header.sh 2>/dev/null; sudo $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-mcp-agent-header.sh $MCP_DOMAIN 2>/dev/null || true"
fi

# --- Step 3: Build and deploy on server ---
echo "=== Building images on server (native arch) ==="

$SSH_CMD "bash -s" <<REMOTE_EOF
  set -e

  cd $DEPLOY_DIR

  export VERSION='$VERSION'
  export GIT_COMMIT='$GIT_SHORT'
  export BUILD_TIME='$BUILD_TIME'
  export DB_DRIVER='postgres'
  export DB_DSN='$DB_DSN'
  export JWT_SECRET='$JWT_SECRET'
  export APP_URL='$APP_URL'
  export OAUTH_SUCCESS_URL='${APP_URL}/oauth/callback'
  export OAUTH_ERROR_URL='${APP_URL}/login'
  export ENV='$ENV'

  # OAuth/Login secrets
  if [ -n '$LOGIN_GH_ID' ] && [ '$LOGIN_GH_ID' != '-' ]; then
    export LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID='$LOGIN_GH_ID'
    export LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET='$LOGIN_GH_SECRET'
  fi
  if [ -n '$OAUTH_STATE' ]; then
    export OAUTH_STATE_SECRET='$OAUTH_STATE'
  fi
  if [ -n '$GOOGLE_ID' ]; then
    export GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID='$GOOGLE_ID'
    export GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET='$GOOGLE_SECRET'
  fi

  # Datadog
  if [ -n '${DD_API_KEY:-}' ]; then
    export DD_API_KEY='${DD_API_KEY:-}'
    export DD_SITE='${DD_SITE:-datadoghq.com}'
    export APM_ENABLED='true'
    export DD_PROFILING_ENABLED='$DD_PROFILING'
  fi

  # UAT custom ports
  $( [ -n "$EXTRA_PORTS" ] && echo "export $EXTRA_PORTS" || echo "true" )

  # Disk space management
  DISK_USAGE=\$(df / | tail -1 | awk '{print \$5}' | tr -d '%')
  if [ "\$DISK_USAGE" -gt 80 ]; then
    echo "Disk usage \${DISK_USAGE}% — pruning..."
    docker builder prune -f --filter "until=48h" || true
    docker image prune -f || true
  fi

  # Build images natively on this server (no cross-compilation, no registry)
  echo "Building Docker images..."
  $COMPOSE_CMD build --parallel --build-arg VERSION='$VERSION' --build-arg GIT_COMMIT='$GIT_SHORT' --build-arg BUILD_TIME='$BUILD_TIME'

  # Deploy with force-recreate
  echo "Deploying..."
  $COMPOSE_CMD up -d --force-recreate --remove-orphans

  # Prune old images
  docker image prune -f || true

  sleep 10
  $COMPOSE_CMD ps
REMOTE_EOF

# --- Step 4: Verify deployment ---
echo ""
echo "=== Verifying deployment ==="
sleep 5

echo "Health check: https://$DOMAIN/api/health"
if curl -sf "https://$DOMAIN/api/health" 2>/dev/null; then
  echo ""
  echo "Health check passed"
else
  echo "WARNING: Health check failed (may be behind Cloudflare Access or still starting)"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== Fast deploy to $ENV complete ==="

rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# CI/CD Pipeline for TaskAI (taskai.cc)
#
# TaskAI deploys by SSH'ing to the target server and building natively there
# (no Harbor registry). Tests run in parallel with staging deploy (fix-forward).
#
# Runners (org-level, biswas-dev):
#   ARM64: staging-arm64 (129.213.82.37), uat-arm64 (92.4.83.28)
#   x64:   prod-x64-1/2 (31.97.102.48)
#
# Flow:
#   main push       → test (Go + Node, parallel) + deploy staging
#   uat push        → deploy UAT
#   production push → deploy production
#   PR              → test only
#
# Required secrets (set in GitHub org/repo):
#   STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64
#   STAGING_DB_DSN, STAGING_JWT_SECRET, STAGING_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, etc.
#   UAT_DB_DSN, UAT_JWT_SECRET, etc.
#   PRODUCTION_DB_DSN, PRODUCTION_JWT_SECRET, etc.
#   DD_API_KEY, DD_SITE

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, uat, production]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  # ── API Tests (Go) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  test-api:
    name: "API Tests (Go)"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    env:
      GOTOOLCHAIN: local

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.26'
          cache: true
          cache-dependency-path: api/go.sum

      - name: Run Go vet
        working-directory: api
        run: go vet ./...

      - name: Run tests
        working-directory: api
        run: |
          go test -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic $(go list ./... | grep -v /e2e)
          go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1
        timeout-minutes: 10

  # ── Web Tests (Node) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  test-web:
    name: "Web Tests"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '24'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: web/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        working-directory: web
        run: npm ci

      - name: Lint
        working-directory: web
        run: npx eslint . --ext ts,tsx --report-unused-disable-directives --max-warnings 5

      - name: Type check
        working-directory: web
        run: npx tsc --noEmit

      - name: Run tests
        working-directory: web
        run: npx vitest run
        timeout-minutes: 10

  # ── Deploy Staging (builds on server via SSH, native ARM64) ────────────
  deploy-staging:
    name: "Deploy to Staging"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: staging

    env:
      STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64 }}
      STAGING_DB_DSN: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DB_DSN }}
      STAGING_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.STAGING_JWT_SECRET }}
      STAGING_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.STAGING_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID }}
      STAGING_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.STAGING_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET }}
      STAGING_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.STAGING_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
      STAGING_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.STAGING_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID }}
      STAGING_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.STAGING_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET }}
      DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
      DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy-fast.sh staging

  # ── Deploy UAT ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-uat:
    name: "Deploy to UAT"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/uat' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: uat

    env:
      UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64 }}
      UAT_DB_DSN: ${{ secrets.UAT_DB_DSN }}
      UAT_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.UAT_JWT_SECRET }}
      UAT_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.UAT_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID }}
      UAT_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.UAT_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET }}
      UAT_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.UAT_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
      UAT_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.UAT_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID }}
      UAT_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.UAT_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET }}
      DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
      DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to UAT
        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy-fast.sh uat

  # ── Deploy Production ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-production:
    name: "Deploy to Production"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/production' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: production

    env:
      PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64 }}
      PRODUCTION_DB_DSN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DB_DSN }}
      PRODUCTION_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_JWT_SECRET }}
      PRODUCTION_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID }}
      PRODUCTION_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET }}
      PRODUCTION_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET }}
      PRODUCTION_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID }}
      PRODUCTION_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET }}
      DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
      DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy-fast.sh production

#!/bin/bash
# Travis CI deployment script for FlagTGL
# Usage: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh <environment>
#
# Staging: deploys the digest from the build stage
# UAT/Production: promotes the previous environment's digest, then deploys

set -euo pipefail

ENV="${1:?Usage: travis-deploy.sh <staging|uat|production>}"

case "$ENV" in
  staging)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="129.213.82.37"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="~/flags-staging"
    COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose.staging.yml"
    DOMAIN="staging.flagtgl.com"
    PROMOTE_FROM=""
    DD_PROFILING="false"
    ;;
  uat)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="92.4.83.28"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="~/flags-uat"
    COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose.uat.yml"
    DOMAIN="uat.flagtgl.com"
    PROMOTE_FROM="staging"
    DD_PROFILING="false"
    ;;
  production)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="31.97.102.48"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="~/flags-production"
    COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose.production.yml"
    DOMAIN="flagtgl.com"
    PROMOTE_FROM="uat"
    DD_PROFILING="true"
    ;;
  *)
    echo "ERROR: Unknown environment: $ENV"
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo "v0.0.0-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)")
GIT_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
BUILD_TIME=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
GO_VERSION=$(grep '^go ' backend/go.mod | awk '{print $2}')

# Decode Harbor credentials (base64 avoids Travis $ expansion issues)
HARBOR_USERNAME=$(echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1)
HARBOR_PASSWORD=$(echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2)

# Determine image digest
if [ -n "$PROMOTE_FROM" ]; then
  # UAT/Production: promote from previous environment
  echo "=== Promoting flagtgl image: $PROMOTE_FROM -> $ENV ==="
  IMAGE_DIGEST=$(bash deployment/scripts/harbor-promote.sh biswas flagtgl "$PROMOTE_FROM" "$ENV")
else
  # Staging: use digest from build stage (shared via Travis workspace)
  if [ -f .image-digest.txt ]; then
    IMAGE_DIGEST=$(cat .image-digest.txt)
  else
    # Fallback: look up staging-latest from Harbor API
    IMAGE_DIGEST=$(curl -sf -u "$HARBOR_USERNAME:$HARBOR_PASSWORD" \
      "https://harbor.biswas.me/api/v2.0/projects/biswas/repositories/flagtgl/artifacts?q=tags%3Dstaging-latest" \
      | jq -r '.[0].digest')
  fi
fi

if [ -z "$IMAGE_DIGEST" ] || [ "$IMAGE_DIGEST" = "null" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Could not determine image digest for $ENV deployment"
  exit 1
fi

echo "=== FlagTGL Travis CI Deploy ==="
echo "Environment: $ENV"
echo "Server:      $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
echo "Version:     $VERSION"
echo "Digest:      $IMAGE_DIGEST"
echo ""

# SSH setup
SSH_KEY_VALUE="${!SSH_KEY_VAR:-}"
if [ -z "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: $SSH_KEY_VAR is not set"
  exit 1
fi

mkdir -p ~/.ssh
echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | base64 --decode > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
ssh-keyscan "$SERVER_IP" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null

SSH_CMD="ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
SCP_CMD="scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key"

deploy_standard() {
  echo "=== Standard Deploy to $ENV ==="

  # Create deploy directory and scp compose files from CI runner
  $SSH_CMD "mkdir -p $DEPLOY_DIR"
  $SCP_CMD "$COMPOSE_FILE" docker-compose.hub.yml "$SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:$DEPLOY_DIR/"

  $SSH_CMD "bash -s" <<REMOTE_EOF
    set -e

    cd $DEPLOY_DIR
    rm -rf .git backend frontend 2>/dev/null || true

    export POSTGRES_PASSWORD='${FLAGS_DB_PASSWORD}'
    export FLAGS_JWT_SECRET='${FLAGS_JWT_SECRET}'
    export FLAGS_VERSION_TOKEN='${FLAGS_VERSION_TOKEN}'
    export DD_API_KEY='${DD_API_KEY:-}'
    export DD_SITE='${DD_SITE:-datadoghq.com}'
    export APM_ENABLED='true'
    export DD_PROFILING_ENABLED='$DD_PROFILING'
    export VERSION='$VERSION'
    export GIT_COMMIT='$GIT_COMMIT'
    export BUILD_TIME='$BUILD_TIME'
    export GO_VERSION='go$GO_VERSION'

    echo "Logging into Harbor..."
    echo '${HARBOR_PASSWORD}' | docker login harbor.biswas.me -u '${HARBOR_USERNAME}' --password-stdin || true

    echo "Stopping existing containers..."
    docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE down || true

    # Disk space management
    DISK_USAGE=\$(df / | tail -1 | awk '{print \$5}' | tr -d '%')
    if [ "\$DISK_USAGE" -gt 80 ]; then
      docker builder prune -f --filter "until=48h" || true
      docker image prune -f || true
    fi

    echo "Pulling pre-built image from Harbor by digest..."
    export IMAGE_DIGEST='$IMAGE_DIGEST'
    docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE -f docker-compose.hub.yml pull flags
    docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE -f docker-compose.hub.yml up -d --no-build

    echo "Deployment complete!"
    docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE -f docker-compose.hub.yml ps
REMOTE_EOF
}

deploy_production() {
  echo "=== Blue-Green Production Deploy ==="

  # Create deploy directory (with scripts subdirectory) and scp files from CI runner
  $SSH_CMD "mkdir -p $DEPLOY_DIR/deployment/scripts"
  $SCP_CMD "$COMPOSE_FILE" docker-compose.production.hub.yml "$SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:$DEPLOY_DIR/"
  $SCP_CMD deployment/scripts/blue-green-deploy.sh "$SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:$DEPLOY_DIR/deployment/scripts/"

  $SSH_CMD "bash -s" <<REMOTE_EOF
    set -e

    cd $DEPLOY_DIR
    rm -rf .git backend frontend 2>/dev/null || true

    echo "Logging into Harbor..."
    echo '${HARBOR_PASSWORD}' | docker login harbor.biswas.me -u '${HARBOR_USERNAME}' --password-stdin || true

    export POSTGRES_PASSWORD='${FLAGS_DB_PASSWORD}'
    export FLAGS_JWT_SECRET='${FLAGS_JWT_SECRET}'
    export FLAGS_VERSION_TOKEN='${FLAGS_VERSION_TOKEN}'
    export DD_API_KEY='${DD_API_KEY:-}'
    export DD_SITE='${DD_SITE:-datadoghq.com}'
    export APM_ENABLED='true'
    export DD_PROFILING_ENABLED='true'
    export VERSION='$VERSION'
    export GIT_COMMIT='$GIT_COMMIT'
    export BUILD_TIME='$BUILD_TIME'
    export GO_VERSION='go$GO_VERSION'
    export IMAGE_DIGEST='$IMAGE_DIGEST'

    bash deployment/scripts/blue-green-deploy.sh
REMOTE_EOF
}

if [ "$ENV" = "production" ]; then
  deploy_production
else
  deploy_standard
fi

# Verify deployment
echo ""
echo "=== Verifying deployment ==="
sleep 10

echo "Health check: https://$DOMAIN/health"
if curl -sf "https://$DOMAIN/health" 2>/dev/null; then
  echo ""
  echo "Health check passed"
else
  echo "WARNING: Health check failed (server may still be starting)"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== Deploy to $ENV complete ==="

rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key

if printf '%s' "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | head -c 10 | grep -q '^\-\-\-\-\-'; then
  printf '%s\n' "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
else
  echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | base64 --decode > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
fi

#!/bin/bash
# Travis CI deployment script for FolioWorth
# Usage: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh <environment>
#
# Staging: deploys the digests from the build stage
# UAT/Production: promotes the previous environment's digests, then deploys

set -euo pipefail

ENV="${1:?Usage: travis-deploy.sh <staging|uat|production>}"

case "$ENV" in
  staging)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="129.213.82.37"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/folioworth-staging"
    COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose.staging.yml"
    DOMAIN="staging.folioworth.com"
    NGINX_SCRIPT="scripts/setup-nginx-staging.sh"
    SSL_CERT_NAME="staging.folioworth.com"
    ENVIRONMENT="staging"
    PROMOTE_FROM=""
    ;;
  uat)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="92.4.83.28"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/folioworth-uat"
    COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose.uat.yml"
    DOMAIN="uat.folioworth.com"
    NGINX_SCRIPT="scripts/setup-nginx-uat.sh"
    SSL_CERT_NAME="uat.folioworth.com"
    ENVIRONMENT="uat"
    PROMOTE_FROM="staging"
    ;;
  production)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="31.97.102.48"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/folioworth"
    COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose.production.yml"
    DOMAIN="folioworth.com"
    NGINX_SCRIPT="scripts/setup-nginx-production.sh"
    SSL_CERT_NAME="folioworth.com"
    ENVIRONMENT="production"
    PROMOTE_FROM="uat"
    ;;
  *)
    echo "ERROR: Unknown environment: $ENV"
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

# Decode Harbor credentials (base64 avoids Travis $ expansion issues)
HARBOR_USERNAME=$(echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1)
HARBOR_PASSWORD=$(echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2)

# Determine image digests
if [ -n "$PROMOTE_FROM" ]; then
  # UAT/Production: promote from previous environment
  echo "=== Promoting folioworth images: $PROMOTE_FROM -> $ENV ==="
  eval $(bash deployment/scripts/harbor-promote.sh biswas "$PROMOTE_FROM" "$ENV" folioworth-backend folioworth-frontend)
else
  # Staging: use digests from build stage (shared via Travis workspace)
  if [ -f .image-digests.txt ]; then
    eval $(cat .image-digests.txt)
  else
    # Fallback: look up staging-latest from Harbor API
    BACKEND_DIGEST=$(curl -sf -u "$HARBOR_USERNAME:$HARBOR_PASSWORD" \
      "https://harbor.biswas.me/api/v2.0/projects/biswas/repositories/folioworth-backend/artifacts?q=tags%3Dstaging-latest" \
      | jq -r '.[0].digest')
    FRONTEND_DIGEST=$(curl -sf -u "$HARBOR_USERNAME:$HARBOR_PASSWORD" \
      "https://harbor.biswas.me/api/v2.0/projects/biswas/repositories/folioworth-frontend/artifacts?q=tags%3Dstaging-latest" \
      | jq -r '.[0].digest')
  fi
fi

# The promote script outputs FOLIOWORTH_BACKEND_DIGEST and FOLIOWORTH_FRONTEND_DIGEST
# Normalize variable names
BACKEND_DIGEST="${BACKEND_DIGEST:-${FOLIOWORTH_BACKEND_DIGEST:-}}"
FRONTEND_DIGEST="${FRONTEND_DIGEST:-${FOLIOWORTH_FRONTEND_DIGEST:-}}"

if [ -z "$BACKEND_DIGEST" ] || [ "$BACKEND_DIGEST" = "null" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Could not determine backend image digest for $ENV deployment"
  exit 1
fi
if [ -z "$FRONTEND_DIGEST" ] || [ "$FRONTEND_DIGEST" = "null" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Could not determine frontend image digest for $ENV deployment"
  exit 1
fi

echo "=== FolioWorth Travis CI Deploy ==="
echo "Environment:      $ENV"
echo "Server:           $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
echo "Backend digest:   $BACKEND_DIGEST"
echo "Frontend digest:  $FRONTEND_DIGEST"
echo ""

# SSH setup
SSH_KEY_VALUE="${!SSH_KEY_VAR:-}"
if [ -z "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: $SSH_KEY_VAR is not set"
  exit 1
fi

mkdir -p ~/.ssh
echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | base64 --decode > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
ssh-keyscan "$SERVER_IP" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null

SSH_CMD="ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
SCP_CMD="scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key"

# Create deploy directory on server
echo "Creating deploy directory $DEPLOY_DIR on server..."
$SSH_CMD "mkdir -p $DEPLOY_DIR"

# SCP compose files and nginx script to server
echo "Uploading compose files and nginx script to $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:$DEPLOY_DIR..."
$SCP_CMD "$COMPOSE_FILE" docker-compose.hub.yml "$SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:$DEPLOY_DIR/"
$SCP_CMD "$NGINX_SCRIPT" "$SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:$DEPLOY_DIR/setup-nginx.sh"

# Create and upload .env file
echo "Uploading .env file..."
cat > /tmp/folioworth.env <<EOF
POSTGRES_USER=folioworth
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD}
JWT_SECRET=${FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET}
TINGO_API_KEY=${FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY}
ENVIRONMENT=${ENVIRONMENT}
EOF
$SCP_CMD /tmp/folioworth.env $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:$DEPLOY_DIR/.env

# Upload Cloudflare Origin SSL certificates (base64-encoded in Travis)
echo "Uploading SSL certificates..."
echo "${CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64}" | base64 --decode > /tmp/cf-origin.crt
echo "${CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64}" | base64 --decode > /tmp/cf-origin.key
$SCP_CMD /tmp/cf-origin.crt $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:/tmp/cf-origin.crt
$SCP_CMD /tmp/cf-origin.key $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:/tmp/cf-origin.key

# Deploy on server
$SSH_CMD "bash -s" <<REMOTE_EOF
  set -e
  cd $DEPLOY_DIR
  rm -rf .git backend frontend dev-portal use-cases 2>/dev/null || true

  # Install SSL certificates
  sudo mkdir -p /etc/nginx/ssl
  sudo cp /tmp/cf-origin.crt /etc/nginx/ssl/${SSL_CERT_NAME}.crt
  sudo cp /tmp/cf-origin.key /etc/nginx/ssl/${SSL_CERT_NAME}.key
  sudo chmod 644 /etc/nginx/ssl/${SSL_CERT_NAME}.crt
  sudo chmod 600 /etc/nginx/ssl/${SSL_CERT_NAME}.key

  # Setup nginx
  sudo bash $DEPLOY_DIR/setup-nginx.sh

  # Login to Harbor
  echo '${HARBOR_PASSWORD}' | docker login harbor.biswas.me -u '${HARBOR_USERNAME}' --password-stdin || true

  # Production: clean up any old named containers
  if [ '$ENV' = 'production' ]; then
    docker rm -f folioworth-backend folioworth-frontend folioworth-postgres folioworth-redis 2>/dev/null || true
    docker rm -f folioworth-prod-backend folioworth-prod-frontend folioworth-prod-postgres folioworth-prod-redis 2>/dev/null || true
  fi

  docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE down || true

  # Disk space management
  DISK_USAGE=\$(df / | tail -1 | awk '{print \$5}' | tr -d '%')
  if [ "\$DISK_USAGE" -gt 80 ]; then
    docker builder prune -f --filter "until=48h" || true
    docker image prune -f || true
  fi

  # Pull pre-built images from Harbor by digest
  export BACKEND_DIGEST='$BACKEND_DIGEST'
  export FRONTEND_DIGEST='$FRONTEND_DIGEST'
  docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE -f docker-compose.hub.yml pull backend frontend
  docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE -f docker-compose.hub.yml up -d --no-build
  sleep 15
  docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE -f docker-compose.hub.yml ps
REMOTE_EOF

# Verify deployment
echo ""
echo "=== Verifying deployment ==="
sleep 10

if [ "$ENV" = "production" ]; then
  echo "Health check: https://$SERVER_IP/health (direct to origin)"
  if curl -fsSk "https://$SERVER_IP/health" -H "Host: $DOMAIN" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo ""
    echo "Health check passed (origin)"
  else
    echo "WARNING: Health check failed (server may still be starting)"
  fi
else
  echo "Health check: https://$DOMAIN/health"
  if curl -sf "https://$DOMAIN/health" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo ""
    echo "Health check passed"
  else
    echo "WARNING: Health check failed (server may still be starting, or behind Cloudflare Access)"
  fi
fi

echo ""
echo "=== Deploy to $ENV complete ==="

# Cleanup
rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key /tmp/folioworth.env /tmp/cf-origin.crt /tmp/cf-origin.key

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# CI/CD Pipeline for FlagTGL (flagtgl.biswas.me)
#
# Native multi-arch builds on self-hosted runners — no cross-compilation.
# Push to main builds ARM64 + x64 images in parallel, pushes both to Harbor,
# then auto-deploys staging. Promoting to prod uses the already-built image.
#
# Runners (org-level, biswas-dev):
#   ARM64: staging-arm64 (129.213.82.37), uat-arm64 (92.4.83.28)
#   x64:   prod-x64-1/2 (31.97.102.48)
#
# Flow:
#   main push       → test → build ARM64 + x64 (parallel) → deploy staging
#   uat push        → deploy UAT (uses arm64-latest from Harbor)
#   production push → deploy production (uses x64-latest from Harbor)
#   PR              → test only
#
# Required secrets:
#   HARBOR_AUTH — base64("username:password") for Harbor registry
#   STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64
#   FLAGS_DB_PASSWORD, FLAGS_JWT_SECRET, FLAGS_VERSION_TOKEN
#   DD_API_KEY, DD_SITE
#   SONAR_TOKEN

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, uat, production]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  # ── Backend + SDK Tests (Go) ───────────────────────────────────────────
  test-backend:
    name: "Backend + SDK Tests (Go)"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    env:
      GOTOOLCHAIN: local

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.26'
          cache: true
          cache-dependency-path: backend/go.sum

      - name: Backend tests
        working-directory: backend
        run: |
          go vet ./...
          go test -race -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic $(go list ./... | grep -v /relay)
          go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1
        timeout-minutes: 10

      - name: SDK tests
        working-directory: sdks/go-server-sdk
        run: go test ./... -count=1 -race
        timeout-minutes: 5

  # ── Frontend + Docs + JS SDK (Node) ────────────────────────────────────
  test-frontend:
    name: "Frontend + Docs + SDK (Node)"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '24'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json

      - name: Frontend build
        run: cd frontend && npm ci && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build

      - name: Docs build
        run: cd docs && npm ci && npm run build

      - name: JS SDK type check
        run: cd sdks/js-client-sdk && npm ci && npx tsc --noEmit

  # ── Build ARM64 Image (native on ARM64 runner) ────────────────────────
  build-arm64:
    name: "Build ARM64 Image"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: [test-backend, test-frontend]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          IMAGE="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/flagtgl"
          TAG="arm64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"

          # Docker login to Harbor
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          # Native build
          docker build --cache-from "$IMAGE:arm64-latest" -t "$IMAGE:$TAG" .
          docker push "$IMAGE:$TAG"

          # Capture digest
          DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$IMAGE:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          echo "digest=$DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          # Tag as arm64-latest
          docker tag "$IMAGE:$TAG" "$IMAGE:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$IMAGE:arm64-latest"

          echo "Built and pushed $IMAGE:$TAG (ARM64) digest=$DIGEST"

  # ── Build x64 Image (native on x64 runner) ────────────────────────────
  build-x64:
    name: "Build x64 Image"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    needs: [test-backend, test-frontend]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          IMAGE="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/flagtgl"
          TAG="x64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"

          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          docker build --cache-from "$IMAGE:x64-latest" -t "$IMAGE:$TAG" .
          docker push "$IMAGE:$TAG"

          DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$IMAGE:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          echo "digest=$DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          docker tag "$IMAGE:$TAG" "$IMAGE:x64-latest"
          docker push "$IMAGE:x64-latest"

          echo "Built and pushed $IMAGE:$TAG (x64) digest=$DIGEST"

  # ── Deploy Staging (ARM64) ────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-staging:
    name: "Deploy to Staging"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: build-arm64
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: staging

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64 }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FLAGS_DB_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FLAGS_DB_PASSWORD }}
          FLAGS_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FLAGS_JWT_SECRET }}
          FLAGS_VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.FLAGS_VERSION_TOKEN }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
          IMAGE_DIGEST: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.digest }}
        run: |
          echo "$IMAGE_DIGEST" > .image-digest.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh staging

  # ── Deploy UAT (ARM64) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-uat:
    name: "Deploy to UAT"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/uat' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: uat

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to UAT
        env:
          UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64 }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FLAGS_DB_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FLAGS_DB_PASSWORD }}
          FLAGS_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FLAGS_JWT_SECRET }}
          FLAGS_VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.FLAGS_VERSION_TOKEN }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh uat

  # ── Deploy Production (x64) ───────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-production:
    name: "Deploy to Production"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/production' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: production

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to production
        env:
          PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64 }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FLAGS_DB_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FLAGS_DB_PASSWORD }}
          FLAGS_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FLAGS_JWT_SECRET }}
          FLAGS_VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.FLAGS_VERSION_TOKEN }}
          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh production

input.new_string: UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
