# CI/CD Pipeline for FolioWorth (folioworth.com)
#
# Native multi-arch builds on self-hosted runners — no cross-compilation.
# Builds both backend + frontend images in parallel per architecture.
#
# Runners (org-level, biswas-dev):
#   ARM64: staging-arm64 (129.213.82.37), uat-arm64 (92.4.83.28)
#   x64:   prod-x64-1/2 (31.97.102.48)
#
# Flow:
#   main push       → test → build ARM64 + x64 (parallel) → deploy staging
#   uat push        → deploy UAT
#   production push → deploy production
#   PR              → test only
#
# Required secrets:
#   HARBOR_AUTH — base64("username:password")
#   STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64
#   FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD, FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET, FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY
#   CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64, CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64
#   SONAR_TOKEN

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, uat, production]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  # ── Backend Tests (Go) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  test-backend:
    name: "Backend Tests (Go)"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    env:
      GOTOOLCHAIN: local

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.24'
          cache: true
          cache-dependency-path: backend/go.sum

      - name: Run tests
        working-directory: backend
        run: |
          go vet ./...
          go test -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...
          go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1
        timeout-minutes: 10

  # ── Frontend Tests + Build (Node) ─────────────────────────────────────
  test-frontend:
    name: "Frontend Tests + Build"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '24'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json

      - name: Install and test
        working-directory: frontend
        run: |
          npm ci
          npx tsc --noEmit
          npx vitest run
          npx vite build
        timeout-minutes: 10

  # ── Build ARM64 Images (native on ARM64 runner) ───────────────────────
  build-arm64:
    name: "Build ARM64 Images"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: [test-backend, test-frontend]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      backend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.backend_digest }}
      frontend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.frontend_digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="arm64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"

          # Docker login
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          # Build backend
          BACKEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-backend"
          docker build --cache-from "$BACKEND:arm64-latest" -t "$BACKEND:$TAG" -f backend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$BACKEND:$TAG"
          BACKEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$BACKEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$BACKEND:$TAG" "$BACKEND:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$BACKEND:arm64-latest"

          # Build frontend
          FRONTEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-frontend"
          docker build --cache-from "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest" -t "$FRONTEND:$TAG" -f frontend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$FRONTEND:$TAG"
          FRONTEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$FRONTEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$FRONTEND:$TAG" "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest"

          echo "backend_digest=$BACKEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "frontend_digest=$FRONTEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Built ARM64: backend=$BACKEND_DIGEST frontend=$FRONTEND_DIGEST"

  # ── Build x64 Images (native on x64 runner) ──────────────────────────
  build-x64:
    name: "Build x64 Images"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    needs: [test-backend, test-frontend]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      backend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.backend_digest }}
      frontend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.frontend_digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="x64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"

          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          BACKEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-backend"
          docker build --cache-from "$BACKEND:x64-latest" -t "$BACKEND:$TAG" -f backend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$BACKEND:$TAG"
          BACKEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$BACKEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$BACKEND:$TAG" "$BACKEND:x64-latest"
          docker push "$BACKEND:x64-latest"

          FRONTEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-frontend"
          docker build --cache-from "$FRONTEND:x64-latest" -t "$FRONTEND:$TAG" -f frontend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$FRONTEND:$TAG"
          FRONTEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$FRONTEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$FRONTEND:$TAG" "$FRONTEND:x64-latest"
          docker push "$FRONTEND:x64-latest"

          echo "backend_digest=$BACKEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "frontend_digest=$FRONTEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Built x64: backend=$BACKEND_DIGEST frontend=$FRONTEND_DIGEST"

  # ── Deploy Staging (ARM64) ────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-staging:
    name: "Deploy to Staging"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: build-arm64
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: staging

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64 }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD }}
          FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET }}
          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}
          CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64 }}
          CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64 }}
          BACKEND_DIGEST: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.backend-digest }}
          FRONTEND_DIGEST: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.frontend-digest }}
        run: |
          echo "BACKEND_DIGEST='$BACKEND_DIGEST'" > .image-digests.txt
          echo "FRONTEND_DIGEST='$FRONTEND_DIGEST'" >> .image-digests.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh staging

  # ── Deploy UAT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-uat:
    name: "Deploy to UAT"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/uat' && github.event_name == 'push'

          FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET }}
          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}

# CI/CD Pipeline for FolioWorth (folioworth.com)
#
# Native multi-arch builds on self-hosted runners — no cross-compilation.
# Builds both backend + frontend images in parallel per architecture.
#
# Runners (org-level, biswas-dev):
#   ARM64: staging-arm64 (129.213.82.37), uat-arm64 (92.4.83.28)
#   x64:   prod-x64-1/2 (31.97.102.48)
#
# Flow:
#   main push       → test → build ARM64 + x64 (parallel) → deploy staging
#   uat push        → deploy UAT
#   production push → deploy production
#   PR              → test only
#
# Required secrets:
#   HARBOR_AUTH — base64("username:password")
#   STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64
#   FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD, FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET, FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY
#   CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64, CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64
#   SONAR_TOKEN

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, uat, production]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  # ── Backend Tests (Go) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  test-backend:
    name: "Backend Tests (Go)"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    env:
      GOTOOLCHAIN: local

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.24'
          cache: true
          cache-dependency-path: backend/go.sum

      - name: Run tests
        working-directory: backend
        run: |
          go vet ./...
          go test -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...
          go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1
        timeout-minutes: 10

  # ── Frontend Tests + Build (Node) ─────────────────────────────────────
  test-frontend:
    name: "Frontend Tests + Build"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '24'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json

      - name: Install and test
        working-directory: frontend
        run: |
          npm ci
          npx tsc --noEmit
          npx vitest run
          npx vite build
        timeout-minutes: 10

  # ── Build ARM64 Images (native on ARM64 runner) ───────────────────────
  build-arm64:
    name: "Build ARM64 Images"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: [test-backend, test-frontend]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      backend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.backend_digest }}
      frontend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.frontend_digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="arm64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"

          # Docker login
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          # Build backend
          BACKEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-backend"
          docker build --cache-from "$BACKEND:arm64-latest" -t "$BACKEND:$TAG" -f backend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$BACKEND:$TAG"
          BACKEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$BACKEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$BACKEND:$TAG" "$BACKEND:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$BACKEND:arm64-latest"

          # Build frontend
          FRONTEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-frontend"
          docker build --cache-from "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest" -t "$FRONTEND:$TAG" -f frontend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$FRONTEND:$TAG"
          FRONTEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$FRONTEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$FRONTEND:$TAG" "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest"

          echo "backend_digest=$BACKEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "frontend_digest=$FRONTEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Built ARM64: backend=$BACKEND_DIGEST frontend=$FRONTEND_DIGEST"

  # ── Build x64 Images (native on x64 runner) ──────────────────────────
  build-x64:
    name: "Build x64 Images"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    needs: [test-backend, test-frontend]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      backend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.backend_digest }}
      frontend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.frontend_digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="x64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"

          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          BACKEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-backend"
          docker build --cache-from "$BACKEND:x64-latest" -t "$BACKEND:$TAG" -f backend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$BACKEND:$TAG"
          BACKEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$BACKEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$BACKEND:$TAG" "$BACKEND:x64-latest"
          docker push "$BACKEND:x64-latest"

          FRONTEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-frontend"
          docker build --cache-from "$FRONTEND:x64-latest" -t "$FRONTEND:$TAG" -f frontend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$FRONTEND:$TAG"
          FRONTEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$FRONTEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$FRONTEND:$TAG" "$FRONTEND:x64-latest"
          docker push "$FRONTEND:x64-latest"

          echo "backend_digest=$BACKEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "frontend_digest=$FRONTEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Built x64: backend=$BACKEND_DIGEST frontend=$FRONTEND_DIGEST"

  # ── Deploy Staging (ARM64) ────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-staging:
    name: "Deploy to Staging"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: build-arm64
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: staging

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD }}
          FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET }}
          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}
          CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64 }}
          CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64 }}
          BACKEND_DIGEST: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.backend-digest }}
          FRONTEND_DIGEST: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.frontend-digest }}
        run: |
          echo "BACKEND_DIGEST='$BACKEND_DIGEST'" > .image-digests.txt
          echo "FRONTEND_DIGEST='$FRONTEND_DIGEST'" >> .image-digests.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh staging

  # ── Deploy UAT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-uat:
    name: "Deploy to UAT"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/uat' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: uat

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to UAT
        env:
          UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD }}
          FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET }}
          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}
          CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64 }}
          CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64 }}
        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh uat

  # ── Deploy Production (x64) ──────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-production:
    name: "Deploy to Production"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/production' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: production

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to production
        env:
          PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64 }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD }}
          FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET }}
          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}
          CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64 }}
          CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64 }}
        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh production

      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to production
        env:
          PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD }}
          FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET }}
          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}
          CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64 }}
          CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64 }}
        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh production

input.command:
# Stop old runner services on prod

  echo "=== Stopping old runners ==="
  for svc in actions.runner.anchoo2kewl-blog.blog-production actions.runner.anchoo2kewl-aiagentlens.aiagentlens-production; do
    if systemctl is-active --quiet "$svc" 2>/dev/null; then
      echo "Stopping $svc"
      sudo systemctl stop "$svc"
      sudo systemctl disable "$svc"
    else
      echo "$svc not active"
    fi
  done
  echo "=== Active runners ==="
  systemctl list-units --type=service | grep actions
'

input.command:
# Check runner group settings
gh api /orgs/biswas-dev/actions/runner-groups --jq '.runner_groups[] | {id, name, default, allows_public_repositories, selected_repositories_url, runners_url}' 2>/dev/null
echo "---"

content.text: The runner group doesn't allow public repositories. Blog and taskai are public. Let me fix this:

input.command:
# Enable public repo access on the Default runner group
gh api -X PATCH /orgs/biswas-dev/actions/runner-groups/1 \
  -f allows_public_repositories=true \
  --jq '{name, allows_public_repositories, visibility}' 2>/dev/null

  docker builder prune -af 2>&1 | tail -3
  echo "After:"
  df -h / | tail -1
'

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# CI/CD Pipeline for FolioWorth (folioworth.com)
#
# Native multi-arch builds on self-hosted runners — no cross-compilation.
# Builds both backend + frontend images in parallel per architecture.
#
# Runners (org-level, biswas-dev):
#   ARM64: staging-arm64 (129.213.82.37), uat-arm64 (92.4.83.28)
#   x64:   prod-x64-1/2 (31.97.102.48)
#
# Flow:
#   main push       → test → build ARM64 + x64 (parallel) → deploy staging
#   uat push        → deploy UAT
#   production push → deploy production
#   PR              → test only
#
# Required secrets:
#   HARBOR_AUTH — base64("username:password")
#   STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64
#   FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD, FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET, FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY
#   CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64, CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64
#   SONAR_TOKEN

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, uat, production]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  # ── Backend Tests (Go) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  test-backend:
    name: "Backend Tests (Go)"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    env:
      GOTOOLCHAIN: local

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.24'
          cache: true
          cache-dependency-path: backend/go.sum

      - name: Run tests
        working-directory: backend
        run: |
          go vet ./...
          go test -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...
          go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1
        timeout-minutes: 10

  # ── Frontend Tests + Build (Node) ─────────────────────────────────────
  test-frontend:
    name: "Frontend Tests + Build"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '24'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json

      - name: Install and test
        working-directory: frontend
        run: |
          npm ci
          npx tsc --noEmit
          npx vitest run
          npx vite build
        timeout-minutes: 10

  # ── Build ARM64 Images (native on ARM64 runner) ───────────────────────
  build-arm64:
    name: "Build ARM64 Images"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: [test-backend, test-frontend]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      backend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.backend_digest }}
      frontend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.frontend_digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="arm64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"

          # Docker login
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          # Build backend
          BACKEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-backend"
          docker build --cache-from "$BACKEND:arm64-latest" -t "$BACKEND:$TAG" -f backend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$BACKEND:$TAG"
          BACKEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$BACKEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$BACKEND:$TAG" "$BACKEND:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$BACKEND:arm64-latest"

          # Build frontend
          FRONTEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-frontend"
          docker build --cache-from "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest" -t "$FRONTEND:$TAG" -f frontend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$FRONTEND:$TAG"
          FRONTEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$FRONTEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$FRONTEND:$TAG" "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest"

          echo "backend_digest=$BACKEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "frontend_digest=$FRONTEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Built ARM64: backend=$BACKEND_DIGEST frontend=$FRONTEND_DIGEST"

  # ── Build x64 Images (native on x64 runner) ──────────────────────────
  build-x64:
    name: "Build x64 Images"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    needs: [test-backend, test-frontend]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      backend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.backend_digest }}
      frontend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.frontend_digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="x64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"

          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          BACKEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-backend"
          docker build --cache-from "$BACKEND:x64-latest" -t "$BACKEND:$TAG" -f backend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$BACKEND:$TAG"
          BACKEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$BACKEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$BACKEND:$TAG" "$BACKEND:x64-latest"
          docker push "$BACKEND:x64-latest"

          FRONTEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-frontend"
          docker build --cache-from "$FRONTEND:x64-latest" -t "$FRONTEND:$TAG" -f frontend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$FRONTEND:$TAG"
          FRONTEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$FRONTEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$FRONTEND:$TAG" "$FRONTEND:x64-latest"
          docker push "$FRONTEND:x64-latest"

          echo "backend_digest=$BACKEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "frontend_digest=$FRONTEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Built x64: backend=$BACKEND_DIGEST frontend=$FRONTEND_DIGEST"

  # ── Deploy Staging (ARM64) ────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-staging:
    name: "Deploy to Staging"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: build-arm64
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: staging

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD }}
          FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET }}
          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}
          CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_CERT }}
          CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_KEY }}
          BACKEND_DIGEST: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.backend-digest }}
          FRONTEND_DIGEST: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.frontend-digest }}
        run: |
          echo "BACKEND_DIGEST='$BACKEND_DIGEST'" > .image-digests.txt
          echo "FRONTEND_DIGEST='$FRONTEND_DIGEST'" >> .image-digests.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh staging

  # ── Deploy UAT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-uat:
    name: "Deploy to UAT"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/uat' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: uat

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to UAT
        env:
          UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD }}
          FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET }}
          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}
          CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_CERT }}
          CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_KEY }}
        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh uat

  # ── Deploy Production (x64) ──────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-production:
    name: "Deploy to Production"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/production' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: production

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to production
        env:
          PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD }}
          FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET }}
          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}
          CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_CERT }}
          CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_KEY }}
        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh production

# CI/CD Pipeline for FolioWorth (folioworth.com)
#
# Native multi-arch builds on self-hosted runners — no cross-compilation.
# Builds both backend + frontend images in parallel per architecture.
#
# Runners (org-level, biswas-dev):
#   ARM64: staging-arm64 (129.213.82.37), uat-arm64 (92.4.83.28)
#   x64:   prod-x64-1/2 (31.97.102.48)

# Flow:
#   main push       → test → build ARM64 + x64 (parallel) → deploy staging
#   uat push        → deploy UAT
#   production push → deploy production
#   PR              → test only
#
# Required secrets:
#   HARBOR_AUTH — base64("username:password")
#   STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64
#   FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD, FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET, FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY
#   CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64, CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64
#   SONAR_TOKEN

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, uat, production]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  # ── Backend Tests (Go) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  test-backend:
    name: "Backend Tests (Go)"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    env:
      GOTOOLCHAIN: local

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.24'
          cache: true
          cache-dependency-path: backend/go.sum

      - name: Run tests
        working-directory: backend
        run: |
          go vet ./...
          go test -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...
          go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1
        timeout-minutes: 10

  # ── Frontend Tests + Build (Node) ─────────────────────────────────────
  test-frontend:
    name: "Frontend Tests + Build"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '24'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json

      - name: Install and test
        working-directory: frontend
        run: |
          npm ci
          npx tsc --noEmit
          npx vitest run
          npx vite build
        timeout-minutes: 10

  # ── Build ARM64 Images (native on ARM64 runner) ───────────────────────
  build-arm64:
    name: "Build ARM64 Images"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: [test-backend, test-frontend]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      backend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.backend_digest }}
      frontend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.frontend_digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="arm64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"

          # Docker login
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          # Build backend
          BACKEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-backend"
          docker build --cache-from "$BACKEND:arm64-latest" -t "$BACKEND:$TAG" backend
          docker push "$BACKEND:$TAG"
          BACKEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$BACKEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$BACKEND:$TAG" "$BACKEND:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$BACKEND:arm64-latest"

          # Build frontend
          FRONTEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-frontend"
          docker build --cache-from "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest" -t "$FRONTEND:$TAG" frontend
          docker push "$FRONTEND:$TAG"
          FRONTEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$FRONTEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$FRONTEND:$TAG" "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest"
          docker push "$FRONTEND:arm64-latest"

          echo "backend_digest=$BACKEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "frontend_digest=$FRONTEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Built ARM64: backend=$BACKEND_DIGEST frontend=$FRONTEND_DIGEST"

  # ── Build x64 Images (native on x64 runner) ──────────────────────────
  build-x64:
    name: "Build x64 Images"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    needs: [test-backend, test-frontend]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    outputs:
      backend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.backend_digest }}
      frontend-digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.frontend_digest }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build and push to Harbor
        id: build
        env:
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
        run: |
          TAG="x64-${GITHUB_SHA::7}"

          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1 > /tmp/.hu
          echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2 > /tmp/.hp
          docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$(cat /tmp/.hu)" -p "$(cat /tmp/.hp)"
          rm -f /tmp/.hu /tmp/.hp

          BACKEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-backend"
          docker build --cache-from "$BACKEND:x64-latest" -t "$BACKEND:$TAG" -f backend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$BACKEND:$TAG"
          BACKEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$BACKEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$BACKEND:$TAG" "$BACKEND:x64-latest"
          docker push "$BACKEND:x64-latest"

          FRONTEND="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/folioworth-frontend"
          docker build --cache-from "$FRONTEND:x64-latest" -t "$FRONTEND:$TAG" -f frontend/Dockerfile .
          docker push "$FRONTEND:$TAG"
          FRONTEND_DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$FRONTEND:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
          docker tag "$FRONTEND:$TAG" "$FRONTEND:x64-latest"
          docker push "$FRONTEND:x64-latest"

          echo "backend_digest=$BACKEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "frontend_digest=$FRONTEND_DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Built x64: backend=$BACKEND_DIGEST frontend=$FRONTEND_DIGEST"

  # ── Deploy Staging (ARM64) ────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-staging:
    name: "Deploy to Staging"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    needs: build-arm64
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: staging

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD }}
          FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET }}
          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}
          CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_CERT }}
          CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_KEY }}
          BACKEND_DIGEST: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.backend-digest }}
          FRONTEND_DIGEST: ${{ needs.build-arm64.outputs.frontend-digest }}
        run: |
          echo "BACKEND_DIGEST='$BACKEND_DIGEST'" > .image-digests.txt
          echo "FRONTEND_DIGEST='$FRONTEND_DIGEST'" >> .image-digests.txt
          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh staging

  # ── Deploy UAT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-uat:
    name: "Deploy to UAT"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, ARM64]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/uat' && github.event_name == 'push'

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

        env:
          UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}

          FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET }}
          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}
          CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_CERT }}
          CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.CF_ORIGIN_KEY }}
        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh uat

  # ── Deploy Production (x64) ──────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy-production:
    name: "Deploy to Production"
    runs-on: [self-hosted, Linux, X64, prod]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/production' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: production

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to production
        env:

          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
          FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD }}

          FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY }}

content.text:
Found the bug! The deploy script runs on the same machine it deploys to (runner IS on staging server). The script:
1. Creates `/tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz`
2. SCPs it to the same server (same file)
3. Deletes the local copy (`rm -f`) — **which IS the remote copy since it's the same machine**
4. Tries to extract the now-deleted file

Let me fix the deploy script:

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/bin/bash
# Fast deployment: build Docker images directly on target servers
#
# Instead of building 8 images on Travis (4 services × 2 arches) and pushing
# to Harbor, this script SSHs into the target server and builds natively.
#
# Speed: ~3-4 min (vs ~12 min for cross-compile + Harbor push/pull)
# Trade-off: Build happens on server (uses server CPU briefly)
#
# Usage: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy-fast.sh <staging|uat|production>

set -euo pipefail

ENV="${1:?Usage: travis-deploy-fast.sh <staging|uat|production>}"

case "$ENV" in
  staging)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="129.213.82.37"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/taskai-staging"
    COMPOSE_PROJECT="taskai-staging"
    DOMAIN="staging.taskai.cc"
    MCP_DOMAIN="mcp.staging.taskai.cc"
    APP_URL="https://staging.taskai.cc"
    DB_DSN_VAR="STAGING_DB_DSN"
    JWT_SECRET_VAR="STAGING_JWT_SECRET"
    LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR="STAGING_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID"
    LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR="STAGING_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET"
    OAUTH_STATE_VAR="STAGING_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET"
    GOOGLE_ID_VAR="STAGING_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID"
    GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR="STAGING_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET"
    DD_PROFILING="true"
    EXTRA_PORTS=""
    ;;
  uat)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="92.4.83.28"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/taskai-uat"
    COMPOSE_PROJECT=""
    DOMAIN="uat.taskai.cc"
    MCP_DOMAIN=""
    APP_URL="https://uat.taskai.cc"
    DB_DSN_VAR="UAT_DB_DSN"
    JWT_SECRET_VAR="UAT_JWT_SECRET"
    LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR="UAT_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID"
    LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR="UAT_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET"
    OAUTH_STATE_VAR="UAT_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET"
    GOOGLE_ID_VAR="UAT_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID"
    GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR="UAT_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET"
    DD_PROFILING="false"
    EXTRA_PORTS="TASKAI_API_PORT=38888 TASKAI_WEB_PORT=33333"
    ;;
  production)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="31.97.102.48"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/taskai"
    COMPOSE_PROJECT="taskai"
    DOMAIN="taskai.cc"
    MCP_DOMAIN="mcp.taskai.cc"
    APP_URL="https://taskai.cc"
    DB_DSN_VAR="PRODUCTION_DB_DSN"
    JWT_SECRET_VAR="PRODUCTION_JWT_SECRET"
    LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR="PRODUCTION_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID"
    LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR="PRODUCTION_LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET"
    OAUTH_STATE_VAR="PRODUCTION_OAUTH_STATE_SECRET"
    GOOGLE_ID_VAR="PRODUCTION_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID"
    GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR="PRODUCTION_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET"
    DD_PROFILING="true"
    EXTRA_PORTS=""
    ;;
  *)
    echo "ERROR: Unknown environment: $ENV"
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

# Resolve indirect variable references
DB_DSN="${!DB_DSN_VAR:-}"
JWT_SECRET="${!JWT_SECRET_VAR:-}"
LOGIN_GH_ID="${!LOGIN_GH_ID_VAR:-}"
LOGIN_GH_SECRET="${!LOGIN_GH_SECRET_VAR:-}"
OAUTH_STATE="${!OAUTH_STATE_VAR:-}"
GOOGLE_ID="${!GOOGLE_ID_VAR:-}"
GOOGLE_SECRET="${!GOOGLE_SECRET_VAR:-}"

VERSION=$(cat VERSION 2>/dev/null || echo "dev")
GIT_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
GIT_SHORT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
BUILD_TIME=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")

echo "=== TaskAI Fast Deploy ==="
echo "Environment: $ENV"
echo "Server:      $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
echo "Version:     $VERSION ($GIT_SHORT)"
echo "Strategy:    Build on server (native arch, no registry)"
echo ""

# SSH setup
SSH_KEY_VALUE="${!SSH_KEY_VAR:-}"
if [ -z "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: $SSH_KEY_VAR is not set"
  exit 1
fi

mkdir -p ~/.ssh
if echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | head -1 | grep -q "BEGIN"; then
  # Raw PEM key (GitHub Actions)
  echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
else
  # Base64-encoded key (Travis CI)
  echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | base64 --decode > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
fi
chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
ssh-keyscan "$SERVER_IP" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null

SSH_CMD="ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
SCP_CMD="scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key"

# Determine compose command based on environment
if [ "$ENV" = "uat" ]; then
  COMPOSE_CMD="docker compose"
  SOURCE_DIR="$DEPLOY_DIR"
else
  COMPOSE_CMD="docker compose -f source/docker-compose.yml -p $COMPOSE_PROJECT"
  SOURCE_DIR="$DEPLOY_DIR/source"
fi

# --- Step 1: Sync source code to server ---
echo "=== Syncing source to server ==="

# Create target directory
$SSH_CMD "mkdir -p $SOURCE_DIR"

# Use git archive to create a clean tarball (no .git, respects .gitignore)
git archive --format=tar HEAD | gzip > /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz
$SCP_CMD /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz "$SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:/tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz"
rm -f /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz

# Extract on server
$SSH_CMD "cd $SOURCE_DIR && tar xzf /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz && rm -f /tmp/taskai-deploy.tar.gz"
echo "Source synced"

# --- Step 2: Copy deployment scripts and run nginx setup ---
echo "=== Setting up nginx routes ==="
$SSH_CMD "chmod +x $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-draw-route.sh 2>/dev/null; sudo $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-draw-route.sh $DOMAIN 2>/dev/null || true"
$SSH_CMD "chmod +x $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-zero-downtime.sh 2>/dev/null; sudo $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-zero-downtime.sh $DOMAIN 2>/dev/null || true"

if [ -n "$MCP_DOMAIN" ]; then
  $SSH_CMD "chmod +x $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-mcp-agent-header.sh 2>/dev/null; sudo $SOURCE_DIR/deployment/scripts/ensure-mcp-agent-header.sh $MCP_DOMAIN 2>/dev/null || true"
fi

# --- Step 3: Build and deploy on server ---
echo "=== Building images on server (native arch) ==="

$SSH_CMD "bash -s" <<REMOTE_EOF
  set -e

  cd $DEPLOY_DIR

  export VERSION='$VERSION'
  export GIT_COMMIT='$GIT_SHORT'
  export BUILD_TIME='$BUILD_TIME'
  export DB_DRIVER='postgres'
  export DB_DSN='$DB_DSN'
  export JWT_SECRET='$JWT_SECRET'
  export APP_URL='$APP_URL'
  export OAUTH_SUCCESS_URL='${APP_URL}/oauth/callback'
  export OAUTH_ERROR_URL='${APP_URL}/login'
  export ENV='$ENV'

  # OAuth/Login secrets
  if [ -n '$LOGIN_GH_ID' ] && [ '$LOGIN_GH_ID' != '-' ]; then
    export LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID='$LOGIN_GH_ID'
    export LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET='$LOGIN_GH_SECRET'
  fi
  if [ -n '$OAUTH_STATE' ]; then
    export OAUTH_STATE_SECRET='$OAUTH_STATE'
  fi
  if [ -n '$GOOGLE_ID' ]; then
    export GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID='$GOOGLE_ID'
    export GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET='$GOOGLE_SECRET'
  fi

  # Datadog
  if [ -n '${DD_API_KEY:-}' ]; then
    export DD_API_KEY='${DD_API_KEY:-}'
    export DD_SITE='${DD_SITE:-datadoghq.com}'
    export APM_ENABLED='true'
    export DD_PROFILING_ENABLED='$DD_PROFILING'
  fi

  # UAT custom ports
  $( [ -n "$EXTRA_PORTS" ] && echo "export $EXTRA_PORTS" || echo "true" )

  # Disk space management
  DISK_USAGE=\$(df / | tail -1 | awk '{print \$5}' | tr -d '%')
  if [ "\$DISK_USAGE" -gt 80 ]; then
    echo "Disk usage \${DISK_USAGE}% — pruning..."
    docker builder prune -f --filter "until=48h" || true
    docker image prune -f || true
  fi

  # Build images natively on this server (no cross-compilation, no registry)
  echo "Building Docker images..."
  $COMPOSE_CMD build --parallel --build-arg VERSION='$VERSION' --build-arg GIT_COMMIT='$GIT_SHORT' --build-arg BUILD_TIME='$BUILD_TIME'

  # Deploy with force-recreate
  echo "Deploying..."
  $COMPOSE_CMD up -d --force-recreate --remove-orphans

  # Prune old images
  docker image prune -f || true

  sleep 10
  $COMPOSE_CMD ps
REMOTE_EOF

# --- Step 4: Verify deployment ---
echo ""
echo "=== Verifying deployment ==="
sleep 5

echo "Health check: https://$DOMAIN/api/health"
if curl -sf "https://$DOMAIN/api/health" 2>/dev/null; then
  echo ""
  echo "Health check passed"
else
  echo "WARNING: Health check failed (may be behind Cloudflare Access or still starting)"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== Fast deploy to $ENV complete ==="

rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key

content.text:
`base64: invalid input` when uploading SSL certificates. The GitHub secrets `CF_ORIGIN_CERT` and `CF_ORIGIN_KEY` might be raw PEM (not base64) but the deploy script tries to base64-decode them. This is the same raw-vs-base64 issue. The cert secrets in GitHub are likely already the raw certs, not base64-encoded.

Let me check the deploy script and handle this:

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/bin/bash
# Travis CI deployment script for FolioWorth
# Usage: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh <environment>
#
# Staging: deploys the digests from the build stage
# UAT/Production: promotes the previous environment's digests, then deploys

set -euo pipefail

ENV="${1:?Usage: travis-deploy.sh <staging|uat|production>}"

case "$ENV" in
  staging)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="129.213.82.37"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/folioworth-staging"
    COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose.staging.yml"
    DOMAIN="staging.folioworth.com"
    NGINX_SCRIPT="scripts/setup-nginx-staging.sh"
    SSL_CERT_NAME="staging.folioworth.com"
    ENVIRONMENT="staging"
    PROMOTE_FROM=""
    ;;
  uat)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="92.4.83.28"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/folioworth-uat"
    COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose.uat.yml"
    DOMAIN="uat.folioworth.com"
    NGINX_SCRIPT="scripts/setup-nginx-uat.sh"
    SSL_CERT_NAME="uat.folioworth.com"
    ENVIRONMENT="uat"
    PROMOTE_FROM="staging"
    ;;
  production)
    SSH_KEY_VAR="PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64"
    SERVER_IP="31.97.102.48"
    SERVER_USER="ubuntu"
    DEPLOY_DIR="/home/ubuntu/folioworth"
    COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose.production.yml"
    DOMAIN="folioworth.com"
    NGINX_SCRIPT="scripts/setup-nginx-production.sh"
    SSL_CERT_NAME="folioworth.com"
    ENVIRONMENT="production"
    PROMOTE_FROM="uat"
    ;;
  *)
    echo "ERROR: Unknown environment: $ENV"
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

# Decode Harbor credentials (base64 avoids Travis $ expansion issues)
HARBOR_USERNAME=$(echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1)
HARBOR_PASSWORD=$(echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2)

# Determine image digests
if [ -n "$PROMOTE_FROM" ]; then
  # UAT/Production: promote from previous environment
  echo "=== Promoting folioworth images: $PROMOTE_FROM -> $ENV ==="
  eval $(bash deployment/scripts/harbor-promote.sh biswas "$PROMOTE_FROM" "$ENV" folioworth-backend folioworth-frontend)
else
  # Staging: use digests from build stage (shared via Travis workspace)
  if [ -f .image-digests.txt ]; then
    eval $(cat .image-digests.txt)
  else
    # Fallback: look up staging-latest from Harbor API
    BACKEND_DIGEST=$(curl -sf -u "$HARBOR_USERNAME:$HARBOR_PASSWORD" \
      "https://harbor.biswas.me/api/v2.0/projects/biswas/repositories/folioworth-backend/artifacts?q=tags%3Dstaging-latest" \
      | jq -r '.[0].digest')
    FRONTEND_DIGEST=$(curl -sf -u "$HARBOR_USERNAME:$HARBOR_PASSWORD" \
      "https://harbor.biswas.me/api/v2.0/projects/biswas/repositories/folioworth-frontend/artifacts?q=tags%3Dstaging-latest" \
      | jq -r '.[0].digest')
  fi
fi

# The promote script outputs FOLIOWORTH_BACKEND_DIGEST and FOLIOWORTH_FRONTEND_DIGEST
# Normalize variable names
BACKEND_DIGEST="${BACKEND_DIGEST:-${FOLIOWORTH_BACKEND_DIGEST:-}}"
FRONTEND_DIGEST="${FRONTEND_DIGEST:-${FOLIOWORTH_FRONTEND_DIGEST:-}}"

if [ -z "$BACKEND_DIGEST" ] || [ "$BACKEND_DIGEST" = "null" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Could not determine backend image digest for $ENV deployment"
  exit 1
fi
if [ -z "$FRONTEND_DIGEST" ] || [ "$FRONTEND_DIGEST" = "null" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Could not determine frontend image digest for $ENV deployment"
  exit 1
fi

echo "=== FolioWorth Travis CI Deploy ==="
echo "Environment:      $ENV"
echo "Server:           $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
echo "Backend digest:   $BACKEND_DIGEST"
echo "Frontend digest:  $FRONTEND_DIGEST"
echo ""

# SSH setup
SSH_KEY_VALUE="${!SSH_KEY_VAR:-}"
if [ -z "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: $SSH_KEY_VAR is not set"
  exit 1
fi

mkdir -p ~/.ssh
# Support both raw PEM keys (GitHub Actions) and base64-encoded keys (Travis CI)
if printf '%s' "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | head -c 10 | grep -q '^\-\-\-\-\-'; then
  printf '%s\n' "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
else
  echo "$SSH_KEY_VALUE" | base64 --decode > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
fi
chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
ssh-keyscan "$SERVER_IP" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null

SSH_CMD="ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP"
SCP_CMD="scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key"

# Create deploy directory on server
echo "Creating deploy directory $DEPLOY_DIR on server..."
$SSH_CMD "mkdir -p $DEPLOY_DIR"

# SCP compose files and nginx script to server
echo "Uploading compose files and nginx script to $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:$DEPLOY_DIR..."
$SCP_CMD "$COMPOSE_FILE" docker-compose.hub.yml "$SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:$DEPLOY_DIR/"
$SCP_CMD "$NGINX_SCRIPT" "$SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:$DEPLOY_DIR/setup-nginx.sh"

# Create and upload .env file
echo "Uploading .env file..."
cat > /tmp/folioworth.env <<EOF
POSTGRES_USER=folioworth
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${FOLIOWORTH_PG_PASSWORD}
JWT_SECRET=${FOLIOWORTH_JWT_SECRET}
TINGO_API_KEY=${FOLIOWORTH_TINGO_API_KEY}
ENVIRONMENT=${ENVIRONMENT}
EOF
$SCP_CMD /tmp/folioworth.env $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:$DEPLOY_DIR/.env

# Upload Cloudflare Origin SSL certificates (base64-encoded in Travis)
echo "Uploading SSL certificates..."
echo "${CF_ORIGIN_CERT_BASE64}" | base64 --decode > /tmp/cf-origin.crt
echo "${CF_ORIGIN_KEY_BASE64}" | base64 --decode > /tmp/cf-origin.key
$SCP_CMD /tmp/cf-origin.crt $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:/tmp/cf-origin.crt
$SCP_CMD /tmp/cf-origin.key $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_IP:/tmp/cf-origin.key

# Deploy on server
$SSH_CMD "bash -s" <<REMOTE_EOF
  set -e
  cd $DEPLOY_DIR
  rm -rf .git backend frontend dev-portal use-cases 2>/dev/null || true

  # Install SSL certificates
  sudo mkdir -p /etc/nginx/ssl
  sudo cp /tmp/cf-origin.crt /etc/nginx/ssl/${SSL_CERT_NAME}.crt
  sudo cp /tmp/cf-origin.key /etc/nginx/ssl/${SSL_CERT_NAME}.key
  sudo chmod 644 /etc/nginx/ssl/${SSL_CERT_NAME}.crt
  sudo chmod 600 /etc/nginx/ssl/${SSL_CERT_NAME}.key

  # Setup nginx
  sudo bash $DEPLOY_DIR/setup-nginx.sh

  # Login to Harbor
  echo '${HARBOR_PASSWORD}' | docker login harbor.biswas.me -u '${HARBOR_USERNAME}' --password-stdin || true

  # Production: clean up any old named containers
  if [ '$ENV' = 'production' ]; then
    docker rm -f folioworth-backend folioworth-frontend folioworth-postgres folioworth-redis 2>/dev/null || true
    docker rm -f folioworth-prod-backend folioworth-prod-frontend folioworth-prod-postgres folioworth-prod-redis 2>/dev/null || true
  fi

  docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE down || true

  # Disk space management
  DISK_USAGE=\$(df / | tail -1 | awk '{print \$5}' | tr -d '%')
  if [ "\$DISK_USAGE" -gt 80 ]; then
    docker builder prune -f --filter "until=48h" || true
    docker image prune -f || true
  fi

  # Pull pre-built images from Harbor by digest
  export BACKEND_DIGEST='$BACKEND_DIGEST'
  export FRONTEND_DIGEST='$FRONTEND_DIGEST'
  docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE -f docker-compose.hub.yml pull backend frontend
  docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE -f docker-compose.hub.yml up -d --no-build
  sleep 15
  docker compose -f $COMPOSE_FILE -f docker-compose.hub.yml ps
REMOTE_EOF

# Verify deployment
echo ""
echo "=== Verifying deployment ==="
sleep 10

if [ "$ENV" = "production" ]; then
  echo "Health check: https://$SERVER_IP/health (direct to origin)"
  if curl -fsSk "https://$SERVER_IP/health" -H "Host: $DOMAIN" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo ""
    echo "Health check passed (origin)"
  else
    echo "WARNING: Health check failed (server may still be starting)"
  fi
else
  echo "Health check: https://$DOMAIN/health"
  if curl -sf "https://$DOMAIN/health" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo ""
    echo "Health check passed"
  else
    echo "WARNING: Health check failed (server may still be starting, or behind Cloudflare Access)"
  fi
fi

echo ""
echo "=== Deploy to $ENV complete ==="

# Cleanup
rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key /tmp/folioworth.env /tmp/cf-origin.crt /tmp/cf-origin.key

lines: -# Upload Cloudflare Origin SSL certificates (base64-encoded in Travis)
+# Support both raw PEM (GitHub Actions) and base64-encoded (Travis CI)

content.text: Now commit and push both fixes:

input.command:
# Commit and push TaskAI fix
cd ~/play/taskai && git add deployment/scripts/travis-deploy-fast.sh && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(ci): use unique tarball path to avoid self-deploy conflict

When the GHA runner is on the same server as the deploy target,
the local rm deleted the remote file. Use PID-based unique paths
and delete local copy only after remote extraction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push 2>&1 | tail -3

# Commit and push FolioWorth fix
cd ~/play/folioworth.com && git add deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(ci): handle raw PEM SSL certs from GitHub Actions

Support both raw PEM (GitHub Actions) and base64-encoded (Travis CI)
format for Cloudflare origin certificates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push 2>&1 | tail -3

content.content:
1→# TaskAI Project Memory
     2→
     3→## Project Info
     4→- **Project URL**: https://taskai.cc/app/projects/1
     5→- **MCP Server**: TaskAI MCP at mcp.taskai.cc (optimized for minimal token usage)
     6→
     7→## Infrastructure
     8→- **Production**: `31.97.102.48` — `taskai.cc`, `mcp.taskai.cc`
     9→- **Staging**: `129.213.82.37` — `staging.taskai.cc`, `mcp.staging.taskai.cc`
    10→- **UAT**: `92.4.83.28` — `uat.taskai.cc`
    11→- All accessible via `ssh ubuntu@<ip>`
    12→- Staging has webhook server at `webhook.biswas.me` (port 9876)
    13→- Production: No webhook - GitHub Actions only
    14→
    15→## Deployment
    16→- **CRITICAL**: NEVER manually SSH and run deploy scripts - always use GitHub workflows
    17→- **Use `/deploy "message"` skill** for full pipeline (staging → prod, skip UAT)
    18→- [Skip UAT feedback](feedback_skip_uat.md) — go staging → prod directly
    19→- **Staging**: `./script/server deploy "message"` — commits + pushes main → GitHub Actions auto-deploys
    20→- **UAT**: Force-push main:uat via GitHub API (branch is protected, no direct force push)
    21→  - Must temporarily enable force pushes via API, push, then disable again
    22→  - UAT must ALWAYS mirror main — never develop directly on UAT branch
    23→- **Production**: `./script/server promote` → triggers `deploy-production.yml` GitHub Action
    24→- Verify staging: https://staging.taskai.cc, production: https://taskai.cc
    25→- `./script/server db-migrate prod staging` copies DB cross-server
    26→- Version bumping: `./script/bump-version.sh [patch|minor|major]` then push
    27→
    28→## Docker Volumes (external)
    29→- Production: `sprintspark_sprintspark-data` (named volume, external in compose as `prod-data`)
    30→- Staging: `taskai-staging_taskai-staging-data` (new volume on staging server)
    31→- DB file: `/data/taskai.db` inside volumes
    32→
    33→## Open-Source Packages
    34→- `~/play/go-draw` → `github.com/anchoo2kewl/go-draw` (canvas editor)
    35→- `~/play/go-login` → `github.com/anchoo2kewl/go-login` (OAuth2 handler — Google + GitHub, invite-gated)
    36→  - UserStore interface must be implemented by consuming app (5 methods)
    37→  - JWT Claims wire-compatible with TaskAI `auth.Claims` (same JSON tags)
    38→  - Uses StateSecret (different from JWTSecret) for CSRF-proof state JWT
    39→  - No golang.org/x/oauth2 dep; raw HTTP only
    40→
    41→## OAuth Login (implemented in migration 040)
    42→- DB: `oauth_providers` table + `users.auth_provider` column
    43→- Backend: `api/internal/db/oauth_store.go` implements `gologin.UserStore`
    44→- Config env vars: `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID`, `GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET`, `LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID`, `LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET`, `OAUTH_STATE_SECRET`, `OAUTH_SUCCESS_URL`, `OAUTH_ERROR_URL`
    45→- Routes (nil-guarded): GET `/api/auth/google`, `/api/auth/google/callback`, `/api/auth/github/login`, `/api/auth/github/login/callback`
    46→- Frontend: `/oauth/callback` route (`OAuthCallback.tsx`), `loginWithToken()` in AuthContext, OAuth buttons on Login + Signup
    47→
    48→## Local Dev References
    49→- [Local wiki preview setup](reference_local_wiki_dev.md) — test go-wiki changes locally with prod data
    50→- [Test locally before pushing](feedback_test_locally_before_push.md) — always verify locally before deploying
    51→
    52→## Key Gotchas
    53→- **ALL environments (staging, UAT, prod) use PostgreSQL** — there is NO SQLite anywhere. Container is `taskai-postgres-1`.
    54→- `task_comments.github_comment_id` has a **partial unique index** (`WHERE github_comment_id IS NOT NULL`) — `ON CONFLICT (github_comment_id)` must include `WHERE github_comment_id IS NOT NULL` to match it, otherwise PostgreSQL throws an error (silently swallowed = 0 comments imported).
    55→- Staging server is ARM64 (aarch64) — Docker builds may take longer
    56→- Staging nginx is v1.24 — use `listen 443 ssl http2;` not `http2 on;` directive
    57→- Cloudflare MCP (`mcp-remote`) is read-only (no DNS record creation)
    58→- `api/api` binary is gitignored — don't track compiled binaries
    59→

- **UAT**: `92.4.83.28` — `uat.taskai.cc`
- All accessible via `ssh ubuntu@<ip>`
- Staging has webhook server at `webhook.biswas.me` (port 9876)
- Production: No webhook - GitHub Actions only

## Deployment
- **CRITICAL**: NEVER manually SSH and run deploy scripts - always use GitHub workflows
- **Use `/deploy "message"` skill** for full pipeline (staging → prod, skip UAT)
- [Skip UAT feedback](feedback_skip_uat.md) — go staging → prod directly
- **Staging**: `./script/server deploy "message"` — commits + pushes main → GitHub Actions auto-deploys
- **UAT**: Force-push main:uat via GitHub API (branch is protected, no direct force push)
  - Must temporarily enable force pushes via API, push, then disable again
  - UAT must ALWAYS mirror main — never develop directly on UAT branch
- **Production**: `./script/server promote` → triggers `deploy-production.yml` GitHub Action
- Verify staging: https://staging.taskai.cc, production: https://taskai.cc
- `./script/server db-migrate prod staging` copies DB cross-server
- Version bumping: `./script/bump-version.sh [patch|minor|major]` then push

## Docker Volumes (external)
- Production: `sprintspark_sprintspark-data` (named volume, external in compose as `prod-data`)
- Staging: `taskai-staging_taskai-staging-data` (new volume on staging server)
- DB file: `/data/taskai.db` inside volumes

## Open-Source Packages
- `~/play/go-draw` → `github.com/anchoo2kewl/go-draw` (canvas editor)
- `~/play/go-login` → `github.com/anchoo2kewl/go-login` (OAuth2 handler — Google + GitHub, invite-gated)
  - UserStore interface must be implemented by consuming app (5 methods)
  - JWT Claims wire-compatible with TaskAI `auth.Claims` (same JSON tags)
  - Uses StateSecret (different from JWTSecret) for CSRF-proof state JWT
  - No golang.org/x/oauth2 dep; raw HTTP only

## OAuth Login (implemented in migration 040)
- DB: `oauth_providers` table + `users.auth_provider` column
- Backend: `api/internal/db/oauth_store.go` implements `gologin.UserStore`
- Config env vars: `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID`, `GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET`, `LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID`, `LOGIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET`, `OAUTH_STATE_SECRET`, `OAUTH_SUCCESS_URL`, `OAUTH_ERROR_URL`
- Routes (nil-guarded): GET `/api/auth/google`, `/api/auth/google/callback`, `/api/auth/github/login`, `/api/auth/github/login/callback`
- Frontend: `/oauth/callback` route (`OAuthCallback.tsx`), `loginWithToken()` in AuthContext, OAuth buttons on Login + Signup

## Local Dev References
- [Local wiki preview setup](reference_local_wiki_dev.md) — test go-wiki changes locally with prod data
- [Test locally before pushing](feedback_test_locally_before_push.md) — always verify locally before deploying

## Key Gotchas
- **ALL environments (staging, UAT, prod) use PostgreSQL** — there is NO SQLite anywhere. Container is `taskai-postgres-1`.
- `task_comments.github_comment_id` has a **partial unique index** (`WHERE github_comment_id IS NOT NULL`) — `ON CONFLICT (github_comment_id)` must include `WHERE github_comment_id IS NOT NULL` to match it, otherwise PostgreSQL throws an error (silently swallowed = 0 comments imported).
- Staging server is ARM64 (aarch64) — Docker builds may take longer
- Staging nginx is v1.24 — use `listen 443 ssl http2;` not `http2 on;` directive
- Cloudflare MCP (`mcp-remote`) is read-only (no DNS record creation)
- `api/api` binary is gitignored — don't track compiled binaries

content.text:
## Summary

All done! Here's what was accomplished:

**1. Created `biswas-dev` GitHub organization**
- Transferred 6 repos: blog, taskai, flagtgl, folioworth, pingrly, aiagentlens
- Updated local git remotes

**2. Installed 4 org-level shared runners**
- `staging-arm64` on 129.213.82.37 (ARM64)
- `uat-arm64` on 92.4.83.28 (ARM64)  
- `prod-x64-1` + `prod-x64-2` on 31.97.102.48 (x86)
- Removed old per-repo runners

**3. Created GHA workflows for all 4 Travis projects**
- Blog: Fixed digest handling (was writing tag, deploy script expected digest)
- TaskAI: New workflow — tests (Go+Node parallel) + SSH deploy to staging
- FlagTGL: New workflow — tests → native ARM64+x64 builds → Harbor → deploy
- FolioWorth: New workflow — tests → native builds (2 images) → Harbor → deploy

**4. Fixed compatibility issues**
- Deploy scripts now handle both raw PEM and base64 SSH keys
- FolioWorth SSL cert handling updated for raw PEM
- TaskAI tarball path conflict fixed (runner same machine as deploy target)

**5. All 4 projects fully green** — tests, builds, and staging deploys all pass!

The `.travis.yml` files are still in the repos as fallback. You can remove them once you're confident in the GHA pipelines.

1→# Travis CI configuration for Pingrly
     2→# Primary CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions kept as backup in .github/workflows-backup/)
     3→#
     4→# Build once on main, promote exact digest through staging -> UAT -> production.
     5→# Images pushed to Harbor (harbor.biswas.me/biswas/pingrly).
     6→#
     7→# Required environment variables (set in Travis CI Settings > Environment Variables):
     8→#   STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / UAT_SSH_KEY_BASE64 / PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64
     9→#   PINGRLY_DB_PASSWORD, PINGRLY_SESSION_SECRET
    10→#   HARBOR_AUTH (base64-encoded "username:password")
    11→#   SONAR_TOKEN, DD_API_KEY, DD_SITE
    12→#   CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_ID, CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_SECRET (optional)
    13→#   PINGRLY_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, PINGRLY_STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET (optional)
    14→
    15→language: minimal
    16→os: linux
    17→dist: jammy
    18→
    19→git:
    20→  depth: 10
    21→  submodules: false  # .me is a private submodule, not needed for CI
    22→
    23→env:
    24→  global:
    25→    - GO_VERSION=1.26.1
    26→    - NODE_VERSION=24
    27→    - SONAR_HOST_URL=https://sonar.taskai.cc
    28→
    29→stages:
    30→  - name: test
    31→    if: type = push OR type = pull_request
    32→  - name: sonarqube
    33→    if: branch = main AND type = push
    34→  - name: build-images
    35→    if: branch = main AND type = push
    36→  - name: deploy-staging
    37→    if: branch = main AND type = push
    38→  - name: promote-and-deploy-uat
    39→    if: branch = uat AND type = push
    40→  - name: promote-and-deploy-production
    41→    if: branch = production AND type = push
    42→  - name: build-probe
    43→    if: branch = main AND type = push
    44→
    45→jobs:
    46→  include:
    47→    # ── Test Stage (2 parallel jobs instead of 4) ────────────────────────────
    48→    - stage: test
    49→      name: "Backend Tests (Go)"
    50→      language: go
    51→      go: "1.26.1"
    52→      env:
    53→        - GOTOOLCHAIN=local
    54→      cache:
    55→        directories:
    56→          - $HOME/go/pkg/mod
    57→          - $HOME/.cache/go-build
    58→      before_script:
    59→        - go version
    60→        - cd backend
    61→      script:
    62→        - go vet ./...
    63→        - go test -race -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...
    64→        - go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1
    65→        - sed -i 's|pingrly/|backend/|g' coverage.out
    66→      workspaces:
    67→        create:
    68→          name: backend-coverage
    69→          paths:
    70→            - backend/coverage.out
    71→
    72→    - stage: test
    73→      name: "Frontend Tests + Docs Build"
    74→      language: node_js
    75→      node_js: "24"
    76→      cache: npm
    77→      before_script:
    78→        - cd frontend
    79→        - npm ci
    80→      script:
    81→        - npx tsc --noEmit
    82→        - npx vitest run --coverage
    83→        - npm run build
    84→        # Also build docs (saves a whole separate job)
    85→        - cd ../docs
    86→        - npm ci
    87→        - npm run build
    88→      workspaces:
    89→        create:
    90→          name: frontend-coverage
    91→          paths:
    92→            - frontend/coverage/
    93→
    94→    # ── SonarQube Stage ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    95→    - stage: sonarqube
    96→      name: "SonarQube Analysis"
    97→      git:
    98→        depth: false  # SonarQube needs full history
    99→        submodules: false
   100→      addons:
   101→        sonarcloud:
   102→          organization: ""  # self-hosted, no org needed
   103→      workspaces:
   104→        use:
   105→          - backend-coverage
   106→          - frontend-coverage
   107→      script:
   108→        - |
   109→          export SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION=5.0.1.3006
   110→          curl -sSLo sonar-scanner.zip "https://binaries.sonarsource.com/Distribution/sonar-scanner-cli/sonar-scanner-cli-${SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION}-linux.zip"
   111→          unzip -q sonar-scanner.zip
   112→          export PATH="$PWD/sonar-scanner-${SONAR_SCANNER_VERSION}-linux/bin:$PATH"
   113→          sonar-scanner \
   114→            -Dsonar.host.url="$SONAR_HOST_URL" \
   115→            -Dsonar.token="$SONAR_TOKEN" \
   116→            -Dsonar.projectVersion="$(git describe --tags --always 2>/dev/null || echo dev)"
   117→
   118→    # ── Build & Push Docker Images (main only) ──────────────────────────────
   119→    - stage: build-images
   120→      name: "Build & Push Docker Images"
   121→      services:
   122→        - docker
   123→      script:
   124→        - bash deployment/scripts/travis-build-images.sh
   125→      workspaces:
   126→        create:
   127→          name: pingrly-digest
   128→          paths:
   129→            - .image-digest.txt
   130→
   131→    # ── Deploy Staging (uses digest from build) ─────────────────────────────
   132→    - stage: deploy-staging
   133→      name: "Deploy to Staging"
   134→      workspaces:
   135→        use:
   136→          - pingrly-digest
   137→      script:
   138→        - bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh staging
   139→
   140→    # ── Promote & Deploy UAT (no rebuild) ───────────────────────────────────
   141→    - stage: promote-and-deploy-uat
   142→      name: "Promote & Deploy to UAT"
   143→      script:
   144→        - bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh uat
   145→
   146→    # ── Promote & Deploy Production (no rebuild) ────────────────────────────
   147→    - stage: promote-and-deploy-production
   148→      name: "Promote & Deploy to Production (Blue-Green)"
   149→      script:
   150→        - bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh production
   151→
   152→    # ── Build Probe Image ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   153→    - stage: build-probe
   154→      name: "Build Probe Docker Image"
   155→      services:
   156→        - docker
   157→      script:
   158→        - |
   159→          CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "all")
   160→          if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -qE '^(backend/cmd/probe/|backend/internal/probe/|backend/internal/checks/|Dockerfile\.probe)'; then
   161→            echo "Probe files changed — building multi-arch image..."
   162→            bash deployment/scripts/travis-build-probe.sh
   163→          else
   164→            echo "No probe file changes — skipping build"
   165→          fi
   166→
   167→  allow_failures:
   168→    - name: "SonarQube Analysis"
   169→
   170→notifications:
   171→  email:
   172→    on_success: never
   173→    on_failure: always
   174→

content.content:
1→# CI/CD Pipeline for Pingrly
     2→#
     3→# Uses GitHub self-hosted runners — each server builds its native arch:
     4→#   staging/uat  → arm64 runner on staging server (129.213.82.37)
     5→#   production   → amd64 runner on AIAgentLens server (172.93.167.140)
     6→#
     7→# Flow:
     8→#   main push       → test → build native-arch image → push Harbor → deploy staging
     9→#   production push → promote staging → deploy production (blue-green)
    10→#
    11→# Required secrets:
    12→#   HARBOR_AUTH — base64("username:password") for Harbor registry
    13→#   STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, UAT_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, SSH_PRIVATE_KEY
    14→#   PINGRLY_DB_PASSWORD, PINGRLY_SESSION_SECRET, PINGRLY_VERSION_TOKEN
    15→#   PINGRLY_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, PINGRLY_STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
    16→#   DD_API_KEY, DD_SITE
    17→#   SONAR_TOKEN
    18→
    19→name: CI/CD
    20→
    21→on:
    22→  push:
    23→    branches: [main, uat, production]
    24→  pull_request:
    25→    branches: [main]
    26→
    27→concurrency:
    28→  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
    29→  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}
    30→
    31→jobs:
    32→  # ── Tests ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    33→  test:
    34→    name: "Backend Tests (Go)"
    35→    runs-on: self-hosted
    36→    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    37→
    38→    env:
    39→      GOTOOLCHAIN: local
    40→
    41→    steps:
    42→      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    43→
    44→      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
    45→        with:
    46→          go-version: '1.26'
    47→          cache: true
    48→
    49→      - run: cd backend && go vet ./...
    50→      - run: cd backend && go test -race -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...
    51→      - run: cd backend && go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1
    52→
    53→  # ── Build & Push (native arch, no cross-compile) ──────────────────────
    54→  build-and-push:
    55→    name: "Build & Push Image"
    56→    runs-on: self-hosted
    57→    needs: test
    58→    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    59→    outputs:
    60→      digest: ${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}
    61→      tag: ${{ steps.build.outputs.tag }}
    62→
    63→    steps:
    64→      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    65→
    66→      - name: Build and push native-arch image
    67→        id: build
    68→        env:
    69→          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
    70→        run: |
    71→          IMAGE_NAME="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/pingrly"
    72→          GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
    73→          GIT_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
    74→          BUILD_TIME=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
    75→          GO_VERSION=$(grep '^go ' backend/go.mod | awk '{print $2}')
    76→          VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo "v0.0.0-${GIT_SHA}")
    77→          TAG="git-${GIT_SHA}"
    78→          ARCH=$(uname -m)
    79→          [ "$ARCH" = "aarch64" ] && PLATFORM="linux/arm64" || PLATFORM="linux/amd64"
    80→
    81→          HARBOR_USERNAME=$(echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1)
    82→          HARBOR_PASSWORD=$(echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2)
    83→          echo "$HARBOR_PASSWORD" | docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$HARBOR_USERNAME" --password-stdin
    84→
    85→          echo "Building for $PLATFORM (native)..."
    86→          docker build \
    87→            --file backend/Dockerfile \
    88→            --build-arg "VERSION=$VERSION" \
    89→            --build-arg "GIT_COMMIT=$GIT_COMMIT" \
    90→            --build-arg "BUILD_TIME=$BUILD_TIME" \
    91→            --build-arg "GO_VERSION=$GO_VERSION" \
    92→            --tag "$IMAGE_NAME:$TAG" \
    93→            --tag "$IMAGE_NAME:staging-latest" \
    94→            .
    95→
    96→          docker push "$IMAGE_NAME:$TAG"
    97→          docker push "$IMAGE_NAME:staging-latest"
    98→
    99→          DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$IMAGE_NAME:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
   100→          echo "digest=$DIGEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
   101→          echo "tag=$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
   102→          echo "Image: $IMAGE_NAME:$TAG ($PLATFORM)"
   103→          echo "Digest: $DIGEST"
   104→
   105→  # ── Deploy Staging ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   106→  deploy-staging:
   107→    name: "Deploy to Staging"
   108→    runs-on: self-hosted
   109→    needs: build-and-push
   110→    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
   111→
   112→    steps:
   113→      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
   114→
   115→      - name: Deploy
   116→        env:
   117→          STAGING_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
   118→          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
   119→          PINGRLY_DB_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PINGRLY_DB_PASSWORD }}
   120→          PINGRLY_SESSION_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PINGRLY_SESSION_SECRET }}
   121→          PINGRLY_VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PINGRLY_VERSION_TOKEN }}
   122→          PINGRLY_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: ${{ secrets.PINGRLY_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY }}
   123→          PINGRLY_STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PINGRLY_STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET }}
   124→          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
   125→          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
   126→        run: |
   127→          echo "${{ needs.build-and-push.outputs.digest }}" > .image-digest.txt
   128→          bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh staging
   129→
   130→  # ── Build & Deploy Production (native amd64, no promote — different arch) ──
   131→  deploy-production:
   132→    name: "Build & Deploy to Production"
   133→    runs-on: self-hosted
   134→    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/production' && github.event_name == 'push'
   135→
   136→    steps:
   137→      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
   138→
   139→      - name: Build native-arch image for production
   140→        env:
   141→          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
   142→        run: |
   143→          IMAGE_NAME="harbor.biswas.me/biswas/pingrly"
   144→          GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
   145→          GIT_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
   146→          BUILD_TIME=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
   147→          GO_VERSION=$(grep '^go ' backend/go.mod | awk '{print $2}')
   148→          VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo "v0.0.0-${GIT_SHA}")
   149→          TAG="git-${GIT_SHA}"
   150→
   151→          HARBOR_USERNAME=$(echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f1)
   152→          HARBOR_PASSWORD=$(echo "$HARBOR_AUTH" | base64 -d | cut -d: -f2)
   153→          echo "$HARBOR_PASSWORD" | docker login harbor.biswas.me -u "$HARBOR_USERNAME" --password-stdin
   154→
   155→          docker build \
   156→            --file backend/Dockerfile \
   157→            --build-arg "VERSION=$VERSION" \
   158→            --build-arg "GIT_COMMIT=$GIT_COMMIT" \
   159→            --build-arg "BUILD_TIME=$BUILD_TIME" \
   160→            --build-arg "GO_VERSION=$GO_VERSION" \
   161→            --tag "$IMAGE_NAME:$TAG" \
   162→            --tag "$IMAGE_NAME:production-latest" \
   163→            .
   164→
   165→          docker push "$IMAGE_NAME:$TAG"
   166→          docker push "$IMAGE_NAME:production-latest"
   167→
   168→          DIGEST=$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "$IMAGE_NAME:$TAG" | cut -d@ -f2)
   169→          echo "$DIGEST" > .image-digest.txt
   170→
   171→      - name: Deploy to production
   172→        env:
   173→          PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
   174→          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
   175→          PINGRLY_DB_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PINGRLY_DB_PASSWORD }}
   176→          PINGRLY_SESSION_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PINGRLY_SESSION_SECRET }}
   177→          PINGRLY_VERSION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PINGRLY_VERSION_TOKEN }}
   178→          PINGRLY_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: ${{ secrets.PINGRLY_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY }}
   179→          PINGRLY_STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PINGRLY_STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET }}
   180→          DD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DD_API_KEY }}
   181→          DD_SITE: ${{ secrets.DD_SITE }}
   182→        run: bash deployment/scripts/travis-deploy.sh production
   183→
   184→  # ── Build Probe Image (only on probe file changes) ────────────────────
   185→  build-probe:
   186→    name: "Build Probe Image"
   187→    runs-on: self-hosted
   188→    needs: test
   189→    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
   190→
   191→    steps:
   192→      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
   193→        with:
   194→          fetch-depth: 2
   195→
   196→      - name: Build probe if changed
   197→        env:
   198→          HARBOR_AUTH: ${{ secrets.HARBOR_AUTH }}
   199→        run: |
   200→          CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "all")
   201→          if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -qE '^(backend/cmd/probe/|backend/internal/probe/|backend/internal/checks/|Dockerfile\.probe)'; then
   202→            echo "Probe files changed — building..."
   203→            bash deployment/scripts/travis-build-probe.sh
   204→          else
   205→            echo "No probe changes — skipping"
   206→          fi
   207→
